highlights.summary:
NIRF 2025 Rankings are out. As per the latest NIRF 2025 rankings, C. V. Raman Global University ranks #96 under the category 'Engineering'.

The CAT 2026 registration is expected to start in the Aug, 2026 for admission to the MBA course.

faqs.question: Which college provides a better median salary for MBA/PGDM: KIIT School of Rural Management (KSRM) or C. V. Raman Global University?
faqs.answer: The median salary package offered to the students after finishing MBA/PGDM from KIIT School of Rural Management (KSRM) is INR 800,000. While, the Median package offered by C. V. Raman Global University after completion of MBA/PGDM is INR 345,000 - INR 385,000. Basis these stats, KIIT School of Rural Management (KSRM) is better option compared to C. V. Raman Global University on the Median salary parameter.

faqs.question: Which college provides a better median salary for MBA/PGDM: Birla Global University or C. V. Raman Global University?
faqs.answer: The median salary package offered to the students after finishing MBA/PGDM from Birla Global University is INR 760,000 - INR 800,000. While, the Median package offered by C. V. Raman Global University after completion of MBA/PGDM is INR 345,000 - INR 385,000. Basis these stats, Birla Global University is better option compared to C. V. Raman Global University on the Median salary parameter.

faqs.question: How can I get direct admission at CV Raman Global University?
faqs.answer:
CV Raman Global University offers direct admission to diploma courses. Further, for admission to UG and PG courses, candidates are required to follow the admission process, which includes the submission of the application form, entrance test, release of merit list, counselling process and final fee payment process. Candidates seeking admission to CV Raman Global College must follow the step-wise admission process as given below.
Step 1: Application Process 2025
Aspirants fulfilling the course-specific eligibility requirements can apply for CGET by visiting the university's official website, CV Raman College of Engineering, for some UG and PG courses. The aspirants shall ensure that they apply within the due date.
Step 2: Selection Round
Further, aspirants are required to appear for the entrance test, i.e., JEE Main, OJEE, GATE, CGET, etc.
Step 3: Release of the Merit List
Based on the marks secured in the entrance test, the college will release a merit list of selected students for the CGET counselling round. Further, aspirants are required to appear for the counselling process.
Step 4: Counselling Process and Fee Payment
Shortlisted candidates are only eligible to appear in the counselling round. After the counselling round, selected candidates are required to pay the admission fee to confirm their seats for admission.

faqs.question: How is the placement facility at C. V. Raman Global University?
faqs.answer: As per Shiksha verified reviews, C. V. Raman Global University has an impressive review rating of 3.59 by 481 students.

college_info.intro:
CV Raman Global University popular programmes are BTech and MBA. MBA students are placed in top companies such as Cognizant, Ncompass Tech Studio, and others. The university provides MBA students with a strong foundation in Business Management while allowing them to specialise in specific areas of interest. MBA course is taught by experienced faculty members who are experts in their fields and areas of interest. The university is committed to helping several students achieve their professional and academic goals.
CV Raman Global University BTech students can become Software Engineers, Data Scientists, Data Analysts, and others. Overall it is one of the highest-ranked universities offering professional, technical, and non-technical courses to students. Check out the below video to know more about CV Raman Global University programmes:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: The candidates willing to get admission must take part in the CV Raman Global University admission process before the last date of application. Candidates must know their CV Raman Global University eligibility criteria and apply accordingly. At the UG level, the university offers BTech, BSc, BBA, and various other courses to students. At the PG level, the university provides MTech, MSc, MBA, and other courses to students. The university also offers 14 PhD courses to students. BTech is offered in eight specialisations such as Computer Science & Engineering, Chemical Engineering, Electrical Engineering, and others. Below are some of the courses offered by CV Raman University Bhubaneswar and their respective eligibility and C. V. Raman Global University fee structure:

faqs.answer: A:    To gain admission to the BSc programme, applicants should have finished Class 12 in Science with Physics, Chemistry, Mathematics, or Biology as a compulsory subject from a recognised Board or University with at least 60% aggregate. Admission to the BSc course is determined through performance in the CGET entrance exam. Those interested in applying can visit the official website to apply online.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Really good infrastructure, but it lacks placement.

review_content.Placements: Placement is not that good. From my batch, there are almost 800 students only in CSE and allied branches, I'm talking about and out of which till now only 200 are placed. The top recruiters are Infosys and Accenture. The highest package is 9 LPA on campus, and the lowest is 3.6, which is by Infosys.
review_content.Infrastructure: No doubt, the infrastructure is very good, they have invested a lot in the infrastructure. The labs and classrooms are all up to the mark. They have a smart screen for each class. But the only bad thing is the hostel's mess food, which is of the worst quality. The hostel rooms are fine.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electronics & Communication Engineering - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: It's an average college, but you can still consider it.

review_content.Placements: I am not certain about the overall placement statistics for the B.Tech programme. However, in recent years, the electronics and communication engineering branch has achieved an approximate placement rate of 85%, with an average package of around 5 LPA. Top recruiting companies for my course are TCS, Infosys, IBM, Accenture, Wipro, Cognizant, Tech Mahindra, Cisco, and Tata Steel. Top roles offered are AIML engineer and cloud engineer.
review_content.Infrastructure: Circular infrastructure is pretty good, with proper air-conditioned classrooms, comfortable seats, proper workbenches, equipment, and machinery available for a good hands-on experience. All the computers that are provided in the laboratories are high-end for simulations and AIML. There are many clubs that can help in gaining experience. Hostel facilities are below average, although some new hostels have been constructed. The condition of the old one is the worst, and the mess is a nightmare. There are some canteens available all over the campus, which are the lifeline of hostellers. Sports facilities are quite good, there is a dedicated football and cricket ground.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electronics & Communication Engineering - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: You can take admission in this college.

review_content.Placements: In my course, Electronics Engineering, 91 percent placement is there, 6–7 LPA in 2024. Top companies were Wipro, Accenture, Apollo, IBM, etc. I have no idea about the internship programs. Many top roles are there, you can participate in any of the competitions and if you win, you can get a chance to go for state or national level.
review_content.Infrastructure: The campus is very good, neat and clean, and the campus is fully Wi-Fi enabled. The classrooms are also very good, in fact, many of the classrooms are fully air-conditioned. The library is also very good, you can borrow books from the library. The food is called average. The medical facility is also very good here, with 24*7 ambulance service of the university.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: Satisfied with faculty. Placements are average. If you study hard, you can get placed.

review_content.Placements: This is my second semester. The minimum percentile should be 7. Infosys comes here. Recently this year, the maximum placement is 45 LPA, so, it is good.
review_content.Infrastructure: Many hostels are good. Many are not that good, so they can be called average. The course is nice, and Wi-Fi and library are good. Medical facilities and an ambulance are always available. The canteen is not good at all. In sports, not all sports are good because of the players, but the volleyball team is at the state level. Everything is good, but there is no good food in or outside the campus unless you cook by yourself.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science & Information Technology - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: Can't say that it's a bad college, just needs improvement in its environment.

review_content.Placements: The placement percentage is different for every branch. For example, like last year, the ECE students had 100% placement, whereas the Computer Science and allied branches had an overall placement of 75-80% with very few securing above 5 LPA. This year's placement is ongoing, where Infosys is offering a 3.5 LPA package to approximately 80 students.
review_content.Infrastructure: The hostel facility is quite good with different categories, single bed, 2 bed, 3 bed, 4 bed and more, with the hostel fees according. The Wi-Fi is available in the hostel. The food in the hostel mess is manageable, like not very good, but also will not make you sick, it's like tasteless food without salt. The non-veg served in the mess is quite good and is prepared well. The classroom and labs are very good with the latest equipment and top-notch facilities.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely dissatisfied the faculty and facilities good infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: Most of placements are from a CS background. Infosys Tech Mahindra, Cisco IBM etc are the top recruiters. Not much internship but those who perform get a good chance of opportunities with CSE CORE. There are allied branches like AIML AIDS Cybersecurity & IoT.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities are good. Classes and labs are the only things that are worth it in college. Mostly the EE lab is worthwhile because it has lots of good and quality machines. Mess food is not so good for protein its only for being alive. One good thing is that it has 1 cricket and 1 football ground. There are opportunities for indoor games also which are organised by their own clubs.

paragraphs: CV Raman Global University admissionto UG, PG, PhD and diploma programmes is open. Candidates willing to apply must register forCGET examsand appear for the same for some UG and PG courses. Additionaly, the university also accepts other entrance exam scores such as OJEE, XAT, MAT, JEE Main and others. Candidates who qualify for the entrance examination can then register onCV Raman Global Universityregistration portal for seat allocation. Read on to learn more aboutCV Raman Global University admission 2025:

CV Raman Global Universityadmission 2025 is ongoingon the official website of the university. Candidates who have any queries regarding admission to CV Raman Global University can go through the table given below to check out the highlighted information:

CV Raman Global University admission to all UG, PG and PhD courses is entrance-based. Additionaly, the university offers merit-based admission to diploma courses. Candidates interested in getting into CV Raman Global University must follow the eligibility and selection criteria set by the college. After filling out the criteria candidate, are required to visit the university's official website to fill out the online application form. Check out the table below for details on theCV Raman Global University Courses, which is inclusive of its eligibility & selection:
Check here for detailed eligibility criteria for more CV Raman Global University courses

C. V. Raman Global Universityfeescontain various components such as tuition fees, exam fees, exam registration fees, and others. Some of the fees are paid one time while some fee is paid annually. Coming to affordability is one of the strong reasons why many candidates don't opt for a degree or a college. While the availability of education loans and scholarships has made education more accessible. CV Raman Global University admission processincludes the submission of the application form, entrance test, release of merit list, counselling process and final fee payment process. Candidates seeking admission to theCV Raman Global Universitymust follow the step-wise admission process as given below.
Step 1:CV Raman Global University Application Process 2025

Candidates fulfilling the course-specific eligibility requirements can apply for CGET by visiting the university's official website of CV Raman Global University for some UG and PG courses. Additionaly, for either course candidates are required to fill out the application from the university's official website. The candidates shall ensure that they apply within the due date.
Step 2: Appear for the Entrance Test

Further, candidates are required to appear for the entrance test i.e.JEE Main/ OJEE/ GATE/CGETaccepted by the university for admission to UG and PG courses. Further, for diploma courses, the university offers merit-based admission.
Step 3: Declaration of the Merit List

Based on marks secured in the entrance test, the college will release a merit list of selected students for theCGET counsellinground. Further, selected students need to appear for the counselling process.
Step 4: Counselling Process & Fee Payment

Shortlisted candidates are only eligible to appear for the counselling round. After the counselling round, selected candidates are required to pay the admission fee to confirm their seats for admission.

Based on the rankings from NIRF, C. V. Raman Global University outperformed numerous other institutes, securing a higher position, indicating that the institute is considered to be doing better in various factors evaluated by the NIRF ranking system. In the 'Overall' category, the institute's ranks have displayed constancy when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, C. V. Raman Global University's rank is #151, the same as last year's rank in the 'Overall' category by the NIRF ranking.

hostel_campus.college_name: CV Raman Global University Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure, but it lacks placement.
reviews.review_text: No doubt, the infrastructure is very good, they have invested a lot in the infrastructure. The labs and classrooms are all up to the mark. They have a smart screen for each class. But the only bad thing is the hostel's mess food, which is of the worst quality. The hostel rooms are fine.

reviews.review_heading: It's an average college, but you can still consider it.
reviews.review_text: Circular infrastructure is pretty good, with proper air-conditioned classrooms, comfortable seats, proper workbenches, equipment, and machinery available for a good hands-on experience. All the computers that are provided in the laboratories are high-end for simulations and AIML. There are many clubs that can help in gaining experience. Hostel facilities are below average, although some new hostels have been constructed. The condition of the old one is the worst, and the mess is a nightmare. The...

reviews.review_heading: You can take admission in this college.
reviews.review_text: The campus is very good, neat and clean, and the campus is fully Wi-Fi enabled. The classrooms are also very good, in fact, many of the classrooms are fully air-conditioned. The library is also very good, you can borrow books from the library. The food is called average. The medical facility is also very good here, with 24*7 ambulance service of the university.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with faculty. Placements are average. If you study hard, you can get placed.
reviews.review_text: Many hostels are good. Many are not that good, so they can be called average. The course is nice, and Wi-Fi and library are good. Medical facilities and an ambulance are always available. The canteen is not good at all. In sports, not all sports are good because of the players, but the volleyball team is at the state level. Everything is good, but there is no good food in or outside the campus unless you cook by yourself.

reviews.review_heading: Can't say that it's a bad college, just needs improvement in its environment.
reviews.review_text: The hostel facility is quite good with different categories, single bed, 2 bed, 3 bed, 4 bed and more, with the hostel fees according. The Wi-Fi is available in the hostel. The food in the hostel mess is manageable, like not very good, but also will not make you sick, it's like tasteless food without salt. The non-veg served in the mess is quite good and is prepared well. The classroom and labs are very good with the latest equipment and top-notch facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied the faculty and facilities good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are good. Classes and labs are the only things that are worth it in college. Mostly the EE lab is worthwhile because it has lots of good and quality machines. Mess food is not so good for protein its only for being alive. One good thing is that it has 1 cricket and 1 football ground. There are opportunities for indoor games also which are organised by their own clubs.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied with teaching faculty, very much worried about placement, and infrastructure is good.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available everywhere on campus. It has a digital classroom. Library is good but non-AC. Labs are not good enough. Food quality is average. Hostel rooms are very congested. The bad thing is that there are no medical facilities on the campus. Sports and games are good.

reviews.review_heading: My experience with CGU is great and enriching.
reviews.review_text: Facilities here are very satisfactory and of high quality. It has a CAD lab, which is very useful for students interested in 3D and 2D design. There are many computer labs for CSE students to do programming. There is a BEE lab to learn about electrical and electronics courses. Wi-Fi is available on the campus. The food at the canteen is good, but there are not many varieties. There is also a food court. A dispenser provides free basic primary treatment, and there is a free ambulance facility.

reviews.review_heading: Excellent decision for any individual thinking about joining this college.
reviews.review_text: It has excellent infrastructure with Wi-Fi, AC, study table, individual desks for study, and individual godrej for keeping things. There are digital classrooms with high-quality benches and AC classrooms. Wi-Fi is enabled.

reviews.review_heading: Above average, if you do not get any GFTI or any other good private college then you can opt for it.
reviews.review_text: Classes are good. Wi-Fi is available across all campus, but runs smoothly in hotels. AC is available in labs. Classroom have smart and white boards both. Hotels are as per your requirement. If you give more money then you will get good faculty members. Mess food is average.

reviews.review_heading: In short, the college is a good choice for you for your UG course for the next 4 years.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are maintained well and ventilated, most CS labs are air conditioned, and Wi-Fi conditions are good, but they need to be improved. The mess food is good, but it also needs to be improved. Moreover, the hostel rooms are also well maintained and in line with modern architecture.

reviews.review_heading: For B.Tech, it’s a good college, not the best, but good.
reviews.review_text: In my opinion, hostel and mess food is good. I’ve seen on social media that some say the college food is the worst, but I think it’s good. They need to add some variety, like milk, tea, extra snacks, or a better morning breakfast, sometimes they give only one dosa, which is very little in quantity, not taste.

reviews.review_heading: Well, my college is an average college with some good faculty.
reviews.review_text: Well, our classrooms are fully air-conditioned, and we have many labs in our ECE department, we have an average-sized library with a moderate Wi-Fi connection, the hostels are good, fully air-conditioned, and even have a badminton court inside. The food is okay, but not good enough.

reviews.review_heading: Incredibly satisfied with college infrastructure, its academic, its placement in 2025, really good.
reviews.review_text: I tell you, all across Odisha, the best infrastructure for classes or hostel is holding C V Raman College. The girls hostel has already a lot of facilities like shopping complex, stationery shops, and all shops within it. Boys hostel has same again things, parallel consisting of gaming areas, sports complex inside hostel. Now, talking about the college premises and infrastructure that holds academic, it's excellent. You will have all AC classes, fully digital, new methods, really good.Now talkin...

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and facilities, but still something needs to be improved, like mess food.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are more than enough. Bus facilities are available for students belonging to CTK and BBSR. Library is present, and anyone can borrow books. AC classrooms are there. AC labs are there. Mess food is below average. Washrooms are clean and don't smell bad.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about C. V. Raman Global University

likes.text: Major companies like Infosys, Wipro, Cognizant, Tech Mahindra, JK Paper, Voltas, Robert Bosch, etc., visited our campus for placements.
The college also has many centers of excellence which help us in providing internships in good companies like CDAC, Boxch Rexroth, VLSI Design, and many others.

likes.text: The college has a good infrastructure with smart classrooms, Wi-Fi all over the campus, well-equipped labs, a big central library and a department library in each department.
Maintained and clean hostel area, decent food quality available in mess, canteen area is bit crowded need a larger hall area, fast medical facility within campus.

Infrastructure.info_text: These insights are automatically extracted from student reviews, without any manual intervention

likes.text: The teachers here are very helpful and have high standards of knowledge and experience, And in my course, i.e., CSE (AI and ML), our teachers make us fully industry-ready.
The curriculum here is relevant which includes many projects and gives students practical knowledge about their course and makes them industry-ready.

likes.text: I am interested in B.Tech electrical engineering as it has better career opportunities.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Good location, nice atmosphere.

review_content.Placements: Students become eligible from the 7th semester. Companies like Amazon, DeShaw, Salesforce, Deloitte, etc., visit here, and they respectively take a good number of students. The highest package was 80 LPA by DeShaw, and the average package is around 13 to 15 LPA. 93% students are placed. I am also planning to sit in the placements and go into the development field.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is a large variety of books in the library related to all fields. All the classes are equipped with smart boards. There are a lot of clubs and societies. Societies function throughout the whole year, and clubs in their respective semesters. In the hostel, we get a basic room with 3-4 people sharing with basic facilities, there are no AC rooms, and there are common washrooms. Meal quality is good, and it serves cuisines from pan-India.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely good campus and culture of my college.

review_content.Placements: Placement record is 93%. The lowest package is around 8 LPA, average is 12 LPA, and the highest is 53 LPA. Recruiting companies are JP Morgan, DE Shaw, Cisco, Wells Fargo, Samsung, Dell, and many more. Internship record is around 60-70% in B.Tech, M.Tech, and others too. review_summary.college_name: NIT Hamirpur Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: A decent college with good environment.

content.Placements: In electrical engineering department at my college, the placement rate is around 95 percent. There is a decent package of placements of around 22 Lacs and the highest package is I guess 55-60 Lacs. Well, the rates are gradually increasing, the level of education and placement is increasing day by day.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is quite decent. The hostels are not up to mark, water shortage, no Wi-Fi, etc., but the classes, lecture halls, laboratories and library are good, and atmosphere is very nice. Overall, it's a nice place with lovely climate and greenery.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely the best placements in 2023.

content.Placements: Students become eligible from 7th semester. Companies like Amazon DeShaw Salesforce Deloitte etc visit here. They respectively take a good number of students. The highest package offered is 80LPA by DeShaw and average package is around 13 to 15LPA. 93 percent of students are placed. I am also planning to sit in the placements and go into the development field.
content.Infrastructure: In hostel we get a basic room with 3 to 4 people sharing with basic facilities. There are no AC rooms and there are common washrooms. Meal quality is good and it serves cuisines from pan india. Wi-Fi all over the campus with CCTV security. Classrooms are spacious and digitally updated. Labs are good all apparatus used in industry is available.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Good location, nice atmosphere.

content.Placements: Students become eligible from the 7th semester. Companies like Amazon, DeShaw, Salesforce, Deloitte, etc., visit here, and they respectively take a good number of students. The highest package was 80 LPA by DeShaw, and the average package is around 13 to 15 LPA. 93% students are placed. I am also planning to sit in the placements and go into the development field.
content.Infrastructure: There is a large variety of books in the library related to all fields. All the classes are equipped with smart boards. There are a lot of clubs and societies. Societies function throughout the whole year, and clubs in their respective semesters. In the hostel, we get a basic room with 3-4 people sharing with basic facilities, there are no AC rooms, and there are common washrooms. Meal quality is good, and it serves cuisines from pan-India.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely good campus and culture of my college.

content.Placements: Placement record is 93%. The lowest package is around 8 LPA, average is 12 LPA, and the highest is 53 LPA. Recruiting companies are JP Morgan, DE Shaw, Cisco, Wells Fargo, Samsung, Dell, and many more. Internship record is around 60-70% in B.Tech, M.Tech, and others too. Top recruiters are Samsung, Dell, and Oracle.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has good infrastructure. It has great scenery in college since it is in the mountains. Building of each department is too good with proper management and all. Hostels also have better space management and mess systems for hostelers, along with night canteen facilities. Separate hostels are available for both boys and girls of each year. Lecture halls are there with all facilities like AC rooms and smart board.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Highly recommended college.

content.Placements: Placements are excellent. Recent years show great placement sessions for CSE placement index is 92% for mechanical, and it was 99%. A student of the mechanical engineering department got placed at 205 LPA on campus placement in an international company. Placements for other branches are also good.
content.Infrastructure: There are very good quality hostels present in our institute. There are a total of 13 hostels in the National Institute of Technology, Hamirpur. The quality of food in our hostel is very good and is hygienic. Mess workers are corporate, and night canteens are present in every hostel. A hospital is also present in our institute.

paragraphs: The admission process includes the application, selection round, cutoff, merit list, and counselling. Find below the complete process aroundNIT Hamirpur admission 2025:
1: NIT Hamirpur Application Process

Students wanting to take admission at NIT Hamirpur are required to complete the application form for the course-specific entrance exam. After appearing for the respective entrance exams, candidates have to apply for the counselling process for the final seat allotment. However, candidates seeking admission to PhD courses are through the official website.
2: Selection Rounds

For its flagship BTech course, NIT Hamirpur admits students with a valid JEE Main score. Candidates are allotted seats through JoSAA Counselling. Admission to MTech is through GATE, followed by CCMT Counselling. Similarly for MSc admission, IIT JAM and CCMN Counselling are required. However, NIT Hamirpur MBA admissions are done through exams such as CAT, MAT, CMAT, etc.
3: Release of Cutoff list, Counselling & Admission Confirmation

The cutoff for BTech, MTech and MSc courses is released by the respective counselling bodies. Whereas, for MBA admission, the institute releases direct merit lists after declaring the final results of all rounds. The shortlisted candidates are then required to pay the admission fee to confirm their seats.
For more information about NIT Hamirpur - National Institute of Technology check out the below videos:
NIT Hamirpur feesfor all UG & PG courses include tuition fees, hostel fees, and one-time fee payments.

Coming to affordability, it is a major reason why a large percentage of people drop out of college. Although the availability of student loans and scholarships has reduced the cost of education, there are sometimes prerequisites to meet to be eligible for them. faqs.question: What is the minimum eligibility requirement for MBA admission at NIT Hamirpur?
faqs.answer: To be eligible for NIT Hamirpur MBA programme, a candidate needs to pass a bachelor’s/ professional degree from a recognised institute/ university with a minimum of 50 per cent aggregate or equivalent CGPA (45 per cent for SC/ ST/ PwD candidates). Candidates, appearing for the final year of bachelor's degree/ equivalent qualification or awaiting result, are also eligible to apply.

faqs.question: How to apply for an MBA at NIT Hamirpur?
faqs.answer: Interested candidates with a Bachelor’s degree from a recognised university and a valid CAT/MAT/GMAT/CMAT score can apply. Eligible students can then apply by filling out the admission form, which can be availed via online mode (nith.ac.in) and has to be sent via post. The selection is based on academic records and scores in the national-level Management examinations.

faqs.question: What is the MBA fee in NIT Hamirpur?
faqs.answer: The total tuition fee for NIT Hamirpur MBA course isINR 1.4 lakh.Moreover, the applicants also have to pay the application fee, which isINR 1,200for general category students. However, for SC/ST students, the fee isINR 600.The fee payment is accepted in online mode. However, this fee is calculated as per theofficial website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.The data available on unofficial sources and hence is subject to change.

faqs.answer: Interested candidates with a Bachelor’s degree from a recognised university and a valid CAT/MAT/GMAT/CMAT score can apply. Eligible students can then apply by filling out the admission form, which can be availed via online mode (nith.ac.in) and has to be sent via post. The selection is based on academic records and scores in the national-level Management examinations.

faqs.question: What is the MBA fee in NIT Hamirpur?
faqs.answer: The total tuition fee for NIT Hamirpur MBA course isINR 1.4 lakh.Moreover, the applicants also have to pay the application fee, which isINR 1,200for general category students. However, for SC/ST students, the fee isINR 600.The fee payment is accepted in online mode. However, this fee is calculated as per theofficial website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.The data available on unofficial sources and hence is subject to change.

faqs.question: Which entrance exams are accepted by NIT Hamirpur?

Candidates willing to get admission to several courses at the National Institute of Technology Hamirpur must apply online on the official website of the university.

faqs.question: Is NIT Hamirpur campus good?
faqs.answer: As per the student reviews, theNIT Hamirpur campushas been remarked as especially beautiful and full of greenery. The campus is spread across 320 acre land. There are also multiple cafés which specialise in various cuisines and have their own signature taste and specialty.

placement_data.title: NIT Hamirpur Placement Overview 2026
paragraphs: According to media reports, the overall highest package offered during NIT Hamirpur placements 2026 stood at INR 3.4 Crore per Annum . The highest package was offered to CSE and ECE Dual Degree students. In Electronics department , the highest package recorded was INR 1.68 Crore per Annum .
15 students have received package 40 LPA whereas 50 students have received placement package above 30 LPA during NIT Hamirpur placements 2026.
As of now, 67 offers have been made to 116 eligible BTech CSE students in 2026 . The average and median package recorded during NIT Hamirpur BTech CSE placements 2026 was 21 LPA and 18 LPA .
Placement drive 2026 is still ongoing and the complete placement report is not released yet.

description: NIT Hamirpur cutoff 2025 for BTech, MTech, and other courses are available on this page. Candidates preparing for the next academic session can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the NIT Hamirpur JEE Main cutoff 2025 along with other exams for different courses, rounds, and categories. Further exam-related updates are below:

In this section, candidates can view the last nine years of NIT Hamirpur JEE Main cutoff ranks for various courses and categories by clicking on the download now links provided below to understand the past years' trends.

NIT Hamirpur JEE Main cutoff 2025 for the first and last rounds are tabulated below for the General AI category students. In the last round, the NIT Hamirpur CSE cutoff 2025 was 15074 in the General category belonging to the AI quota. For other core branches, such as ECE and Mechanical, the JEE Main last round closing ranks for admission were 23269 and 40442, respectively for the General category. The cutoff ranks for core BTech branches are usually on the lower side, indicating competitive cuto

For the General AI category students, the NIT Hamirpur B.E. / B.Tech cutoff 2025 ranged between 15074 and 57218 in the last round. Considering the lowest cutoff ranks of 15074 and 17150, B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering and Integrated B.Tech. + M.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering were the top two most competitive branches for admission among the students belonging to the General category.

JEE Main is the accepting exam for admission to the BTech and other UG courses. Qualified candidates are then eligible for the JoSAA and CSAB counselling process for final seat allocation. In this section, aspirants can find out all the important JEE Main 2026 dates to be eligible for admission.

JoSAA counselling 2025 is now over for admission to the Engineering courses offered at NIT Hamirpur. In 2025, the JoSAA counselling was conducted for up to six rounds. Further counselling rounds were conducted by CSAB to fill the vacant seats. Students who appeared for the JoSAA and CSAB counselling rounds can refer to the table below to view or download the round- and year-wise JEE Main cutoff lists for BTech admission at NIT Hamirpur to understand the cutoff trends.

Tabulated below are the BTech specialisations available for admission based on the last round closing ranks of JEE Main. This will help students to make an informed decision to get the right college and specialisation for admission. The options below are available for students belonging to the General AI quota and are in the range of the most competitive BTech specialisation of NIT Hamirpur. To refine their searches, students can also use the provided filters.

As per the GATE cutoff 2025, the top two most challenging M.E./M.Tech specialisations were M.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering and M.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence) with last round cutoff scores of 539 and 510, respectively, for the General AI quota. In the table below, candidates can view the branch-wise first and last round cutoff scores.

Tabulated below are the GATE CCMT last round cutoff scores for 2025, 2024 and 2023 across different rounds, categories and quotas. For the General AI quota, the last round cutoff scores varied between 350 and 539. While for the OBC category students, the final round cutoff scores were concluded between the range of 298 and 489 in the AI quota.

Candidates can refer to the table below to view some of the important GATE 2026 dates to be eligible for admission to the ME/MTech course. GATE is the accepting exam, followed by the CCMT counselling process for admission.

Tabulated below are the GATE cutoff lists across different rounds and years for ME/MTech admission at NIT Hamirpur - National Institute of Technology. The consolidated cutoff list will help students understand the past years cutoff trends.

NIT Hamirpur CCMN cutoff 2026 is yet to be released for admission to the MSc/MSc Tech courses. In the meantime, candidates can refer to the table below to view the specialisation-wise 2025 cutoff details for the General AI category students. During the NIT Hamirpur MSc cutoff 2025, the last round closing ranks varied between 775 and 1686. Of all the specialisations, the one with the lowest cutoff rank of 775 was M.Sc. in Mathematics and Computing in the General AI category. This indicates that t

The maximum cutoff rank required for MSc admission was 1686 in the General AI quota. This indicates that students with a cutoff rank below the mentioned rank here have higher chances of getting admission to their desired specialisations. The cutoff ranks vary across different rounds, categories and specialisations.
Within the MSc course, the top two most competitive specialisations were M.Sc. in Mathematics and Computing and , with last round closing ranks of and , respe

CCMN is the centralised platform for admissions to the MSc and MSc (Tech Programmes) at NITs, IIEST Shibpur, and some CFTI institutes that accept the IIT JAM scorecard. This year, CCMN counselling was conducted for three regular rounds and two special rounds for MSc admission across different participating institutes. Candidates preparing for NIT Hamirpur admission can refer to the table below to view or download the year- and round-wise CCMN cutoff list.

As per NIT Hamirpur DASA UG cutoff 2022, the last round closing rank for Bachelor of Architecture (B.Arch.) stood at 47 after Round 3 Seat Allotment for the General category candidates. Tabulated below are the DASA UG closing ranks for NIT Hamirpur cutoff 2022 along with 2021 for the General category students:

Considering the last round of NIT Hamirpur CCMT cutoff 2025, core M.E./M.Tech branches, including Computer Science and Engineering and Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence), witnessed higher cutoffs for admission, while branches such as Electronics and Communication Engineering (VLSI Design) and Materials Science and Engineering had comparatively relaxed cutoff scores for admission in the General category under the AI quota.

facilities: Hostel: NIT Hamirpur is a residential campus with eight boys' hostels and four girls' hostels. These hostels are a combination of triple-seated or four-seated rooms, while some are double occupancy as well as single occupancy rooms.

Healthcare Centre: NIT Hamirpur has its own healthcare centre to meet the basic health needs of students or anyone who is part of the system. The emergency cases are sent to the zonal hospital in Hamirpur.

Sports Complex: NIT Hamirpur has a sports facility for different indoor and outdoor sports activities. The sports complex has a ground and a courtyard where students can play cricket, football, lawn tennis, volleyball, badminton and more.

Central Library: Spread over a floor area of 3200 sqm, NIT Hamirpur has a central library with more than 1 lakh books and a plethora of scientific journals, present in both print and electronic media. The central library also has a reading room with the capacity to house 600 students at a time.

Incubation Cell: In March 2017, NIT Hamirpur entered into an agreement with the Government of Himachal Pradesh to set up an incubation cell at the campus. Incubation cell is set up in the central block building with a designated area of 64.28 sqm.

reviews.review_heading: A decent college with good environment.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is quite decent. The hostels are not up to mark, water shortage, no Wi-Fi, etc., but the classes, lecture halls, laboratories and library are good, and atmosphere is very nice. Overall, it's a nice place with lovely climate and greenery.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely the best placements in 2023.
reviews.review_text: In hostel we get a basic room with 3 to 4 people sharing with basic facilities. There are no AC rooms and there are common washrooms. Meal quality is good and it serves cuisines from pan india. Wi-Fi all over the campus with CCTV security. Classrooms are spacious and digitally updated. Labs are good all apparatus used in industry is available.

reviews.review_heading: Good location, nice atmosphere.
reviews.review_text: There is a large variety of books in the library related to all fields. All the classes are equipped with smart boards. There are a lot of clubs and societies. Societies function throughout the whole year, and clubs in their respective semesters. In the hostel, we get a basic room with 3-4 people sharing with basic facilities, there are no AC rooms, and there are common washrooms. Meal quality is good, and it serves cuisines from pan-India.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely good campus and culture of my college.
reviews.review_text: Our college has good infrastructure. It has great scenery in college since it is in the mountains. Building of each department is too good with proper management and all. Hostels also have better space management and mess systems for hostelers, along with night canteen facilities. Separate hostels are available for both boys and girls of each year. Lecture halls are there with all facilities like AC rooms and smart board.

reviews.review_heading: Highly recommended college.
reviews.review_text: There are very good quality hostels present in our institute. There are a total of 13 hostels in the National Institute of Technology, Hamirpur. The quality of food in our hostel is very good and is hygienic. Mess workers are corporate, and night canteens are present in every hostel. A hospital is also present in our institute.

reviews.review_heading: The natural beauty of NIT Hamirpur is so awesome. You will love it.
reviews.review_text: If you are a fresher, then your hostel is KBH (Kailash Boys Hostel). Hostels are so awesome, but you will see some monkeys. Monkeys are not as harmful as you think. The one thing is that there are three to four LAN cables in each room. If your LAN is not working, then you can also use Wi-Fi, which is very fast and unlimited. The library is also open for you, but till 8:00 PM in the first year. When you become a senior, you will get HBH hostel and library up to 12:00 AM. All classrooms have a dig...

reviews.review_heading: Best weather, strict faculty, trips are absolutely heaven, and more than average placements.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available in the hostel, library, and lecture halls. The library is central, fully air-conditioned, and has blowers in winters. Departments are really nice except the MNC department, which has only classrooms and not exactly a separate department. Hostels are quite nice and get lenient as you move to higher years. Mess food is more than good except in HBH boys hostel. Ground and SAC are there for extracurricular activities, sports, and games, and the gym is also there, separate for girl...

reviews.review_heading: NIT Hamirpur College review.
reviews.review_text: The hostel and mess are good enough to manage. Wi-Fi is available in classrooms, and LAN is available in hostel rooms. We can get anything you want on campus only. Classrooms are well-ventilated, and every classroom has a projector. There is a big stadium for cricket and football, and an indoor stadium for badminton.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, NIT, Hamirpur is the best.
reviews.review_text: Facilities available in our college are so good, as there are furnished labs, a good library, classrooms with a projector that are air conditioned, a lecture hall, and a library. Due to the quality of food being average, I prefer to choose a hostel because in a hostel, the food is average in mess. You can even see it, but anyway, do choose a hostel over mess food.

reviews.review_heading: Perhaps the best college you can get at this rank.
reviews.review_text: Hostel facilities are decent, with some issues. The food is generally good with some exceptions. Major issues can be shortage of water during rainy season which causes a lot of problems. The issue is that there are mostly 4 seater rooms till third and single seater rooms available only for fourth-year students. The lab facilities are good, and there are more than enough opportunities for those who try to get them.

reviews.review_heading: Beautiful engineering college.
reviews.review_text: Beautiful and green campus location, and there is Wi-Fi all over the campus, you will stay connected near the department building, hostel, and library. Talking about the library, it is quite good, I'll say, and provides every facility that is necessary. Hostel food is, I'll say, average, not too good, and there are medical facilities 24/7 and a health centre within the campus.

reviews.review_heading: Good off-campus placement, decent overall.
reviews.review_text: Department infrastructure is great, but hostel infrastructure depends on blocks. Some blocks of hostel have good quality services, but others don't have proper cleaning, and some are even broken. There is a library, Wi-Fi is also available, however, it is pretty slow in some areas. Labs are good, and so are the classrooms (1st year lecture hall is a bit bad as it doesn't have AC, but later it gets good). Food in Kailash Boys Hostel (1st year hostel) is good except dinner (Only sweets are good in...

reviews.review_heading: NIT, Hamirpur college shiksha review by Abhivadan Chandel.
reviews.review_text: This college has the best infrastructure facilities available and uses high-quality products, and many things are the same as those in multiple colleges. In this college, canteen food is also good and hygienic. This college has available facilities like a classroom, a bathroom, labs, Wi-Fi, a lift, a campus, an auditorium, etc.

reviews.review_heading: NIT Hamirpur engineering course admission taken in 2025-26.
reviews.review_text: in this course, there are many facilities available for the student, like a classroom, a bathroom, a library, auditorium, CCTV, a canteen, hostel, etc. facilities are available. in this college, the canteen food is very tasty and hygienic, and many sports and games are organized every year.

reviews.review_heading: The college campus is really beautiful.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure available for our course are extremely good. A large library is present on the college campus with proper study arrangements. The quality of facilities available in the hostel is also very good. The campus is very beautiful.

data.description: NIT Hamirpur has over 250 acres of campus area. The university gives modern amenities with good infrastructure to its students. The facilities of the National Institute of Technology Hamirpur include Healthcare Centre, Sports Complex, Central Library, Incubation Cell, etc. The institute also has a hostel facility with eight boys hostels and four girls hostels. These hostels have the option to choose from triple-seated or four-seated rooms. There are some double occupancy as well as single occupancy rooms.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about NIT Hamirpur - National Institute of Technology

likes.text: Big companies like Amazon, HCL, Flipcart, Paytm, Samsung, Oracle, Infosys, and many others visit our campus to hire students for placements.
Placements for CSE department are very good with a lot of companies available for campus recruitments.

highlights.summary:
NIRF 2025 Rankings are out. As per the latest NIRF 2025 rankings, IIITM Gwalior has been ranked #96 under the 'Engineering' category.

A few more updates are given below:

table.details: - 93 under Management category - 96 under Engineering category

college_info.intro:
IIITM Gwalior popular programmes are BTech and MBA. BTech and MBA students are placed in top companies at top positions such as Uber, Google, Goldman Sachs, and others. BTech students can become Engineers and can join domains such as Information Systems, Complex Systems, Distributed Systems, Data Mining, Computer Vision, Computer Networks, Cybersecurity and Software Engineering. BTech students are taught subjects such as Engineering Physics, Data Structures, etc.
IIITM Gwalior MBA students can become Mangers and are taught leadership skills, technical skills, and several other skills to upgrade their knowledge and to make them industry ready. Overall, the college has been ranked at a good position under the Engineering and Management categories by the NIRF 2025.
Candidates can check about BTech offered at IIITM Gwalior in the video provided below:

reviews_list.batch_info: Integrated B.Tech. in Information Technology + MBA - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: First established the IIIT under the MOE.

review_content.Placements: Almost 95% of the students were placed by the placement cell. The on-campus placements were almost 67%, and the remaining were off-campus. According to the RTI, we got to know that the minimum package was 7 LPA, which was received by a 2-year MBA student, and the highest package received was 65 LPA in every branch, and the average package was around 28 LPA. Internships were given by many top-level companies such as Google, DE Shaw, and many more. The most prominent roles offered were related to SDE.
review_content.Infrastructure: We have a library with AC equipped in it, and we also have a Wi-Fi-enabled campus reaching 50 Mbps in the worst areas. Labs are very well-equipped, and the computer lab is the best of all, having the best configuration of systems and almost more than 200 PCs of that configuration that are very easily accessible.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Really good infrastructure and placements.

review_content.Placements: 98.21% of students passed out this year from our college. Highest package is 67 LPA, the lowest package is 10 LPA, and the average is 24 LPA. Top recruiting companies from our campus are Google, Grow, Microsoft, and Meesho. Google also hires students for internships.
review_content.Infrastructure: Library is very good. All kinds of books are available there, and you can also issue books for yourself. Wi-Fi routers are provided, and internet speed is also quite good. Classrooms are air-conditioned. Labs are also maintained properly. Food is not as good as it should be, and in mess after sometimes quality degrades. There are 3 canteens where you can eat. Medical facilities are available. There is a doctor present at his time, and you can consult him in case of small injuries.

faqs.answer: After JEE session 2 is completed, only those candidates who are aiming for IITs need to start preparing for JEE Advanced after clearing JEE Main. Those who are above the 98th percentile should start preparing for JEE Advanced as soon as possible. Those below this, between the 95th and 98th percentile, should focus on attempting more mock tests and previous year question papers so that they have a better chance of clearing JEE Advanced
faqs.question: Q: What can students do after JEE Main session 2 result?

faqs.answer: Atal Bihari Vajpayee Indian Institute of Information Technology and Management (ABV IIITM) Gwalior offers students and staff extensive infrastructure. With all the latest facilities, the institute is built over an area of about 160 acres. The campus is divided into several blocks, some of which are designated for housing units and the remaining for various departments of education and resource centres. Computer laboratories and data processing centres are also available. ABV IIITM facilities include playgrounds and sports activities for student recreation. The institute also hosts several seminars throughout the year to keep students engaged in their areas of interest.

overview_faqs.answer: The total tuition fee of the BTech programme is INR 5.2 Lacs - INR 6.5 lakh. There is a range in the fee because BTech is also offered as Integrated BTech in Information Technology + MBA and Integrated BTech + M.Tech in Information Technology. IIIT Gwalior also offers scholarships as the management understands that not everyone can afford this fee.

overview_faqs.question: Is CS a BTech branch in ABV-IIITM Gwalior?
overview_faqs.answer: ABV IIITM Gwalior offers a four-year BTech course in only one specialisation: Computer Science and Engineering. BTech admission is entrance-based. Students need to fulfil the minimum eligibility and qualify for the respective entrance exam in order to get admission. To get detailed information regarding eligibility, selection criteria, seat intake and course fee related to IIIT Gwalior BTech admission 2023 have a glance at the table below:Course NameEligibility & Selection CriteriaTotal Fee & Seat IntakeBTech (Computer Science & Engineering)Eligibility: Class 12 with a minimum of 75% aggregate in PCM from a recognised boardSelection Criteria: JEE Main + JoSAA + CSAB CounsellingTotal Fee: INR 5.2 lakh*Seat Intake: 74

overview_faqs.question: What is the total tuition fee of the MBA programme at IIITM Gwalior?
overview_faqs.answer: The total tuition fee of the MBA programme at IIITM Gwalior ranges from INR 2.96 Lacs to INR 6.5 lakh. MBA is also provided integrated with BTech. As the fee provided is from unofficial sources, it should be considered indicative only. To learn more about this, students should visit the official website.

review_summary.college_name: IIITM Gwalior Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Integrated B.Tech. + M.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure, strong academics, and decent placements at IIIT, Gwalior.

content.Placements: More than 90% batch is placed. The highest package is 80 LPA from LinkedIn, and the lowest goes till 6-7 LPA. Top recruiters are DeShaw, Google, Uber, Media.net, and many more. Around 30% batch gets intern, intern, season, and top roles are SDE and business analyst.
content.Infrastructure: The department has well-equipped labs, smart classrooms, a library, and campus-wide Wi-Fi. Hostels are decent with basic facilities, food quality is average, medical care is available, and sports facilities support indoor and outdoor games and others.

individual_reviews.course: Integrated B.Tech. in Information Technology + MBA - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied with the facilities provided, and the placement is really good and improving every year.

content.Placements: The placement is nice. There are a lot of opportunities provided by the college to get placed. The placement record is good, too. The only thing is that many off-campus offers are included. Overall, the Training and Placement Cell (TPC) here has experienced staff who have pretty solid connections, hence bringing ample offers to the college.
content.Infrastructure: The hostels for first-year students are more recently built, hence are better than any college compared. The hostels that are allotted for the later-year students are old. There are lots of things which don't meet the expectations, like the old fan connections and all. The mess is pretty decent for all hostels. Wi-Fi and LAN connections sometimes have a few little fluctuations, like any other college, but overall, they are nice.

individual_reviews.course: Integrated B.Tech. in Information Technology + MBA - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: First established the IIIT under the MOE.

content.Placements: Almost 95% of the students were placed by the placement cell. The on-campus placements were almost 67%, and the remaining were off-campus. According to the RTI, we got to know that the minimum package was 7 LPA, which was received by a 2-year MBA student, and the highest package received was 65 LPA in every branch, and the average package was around 28 LPA. Internships were given by many top-level companies such as Google, DE Shaw, and many more. The most prominent roles offered were related to SDE.
content.Infrastructure: We have a library with AC equipped in it, and we also have a Wi-Fi-enabled campus reaching 50 Mbps in the worst areas. Labs are very well-equipped, and the computer lab is the best of all, having the best configuration of systems and almost more than 200 PCs of that configuration that are very easily accessible.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Really good infrastructure and placements.

content.Placements: 98.21% of students passed out this year from our college. Highest package is 67 LPA, the lowest package is 10 LPA, and the average is 24 LPA. Top recruiting companies from our campus are Google, Grow, Microsoft, and Meesho. Google also hires students for internships.
content.Infrastructure: Library is very good. All kinds of books are available there, and you can also issue books for yourself. Wi-Fi routers are provided, and internet speed is also quite good. Classrooms are air-conditioned. Labs are also maintained properly. Food is not as good as it should be, and in mess after sometimes quality degrades. There are 3 canteens where you can eat. Medical facilities are available. There is a doctor present at his time, and you can consult him in case of small injuries.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Large campus area, top-notch placements, hostels and mess food can be improved.

content.Placements: Due to less number of branches, placements are excellent. In this year (2025), 97.76% of students got placed. 38 students got above 50+ LPA. The highest salary is 67.5LPA, and average salary is 28 LPA. Top recruiters are Google, Cisco, etc. Almost 80-85% of students got internships. Top role offered is SDE.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is good, but the boys hostels are not so good because the hostels require renovation as they get older. All the necessary facilities are available for living in hostels, like Wi-Fi (sometimes there may be some problem but mostly good with upto 80-90 Mbps speed), classrooms are fully air-conditioned with proper sitting arrangements, and library is also there, which is also fully air-conditioned. Mess food is okay. Medical facilities are available, whenever required. All the sports grounds are available on the campus like basketball court, lawn tennis court, cricket ground, kabaddi ground, etc.

admission_overview.college_name: IIITM Gwalior IIITM Gwalior Admission 2025: Cutoff, Fees, Eligibility & Application

paragraphs: IIITM Gwalior offers admissions to all courses based on national-level entrance exams, followed by a counselling process.IIITM Gwalior Madhya Pradeshaccepts JEE Main, CAT, and GATE scores. PhD admissions are conducted twice a year. IIIT Gwalior also offers a PhD programme along with BTech.
IIITM Gwalior Admission 2025: Eligibility & Selection Criteria

Admission to allIIITM Gwalior coursesis conducted through national-level entrance exams. Eligible candidates can register online through the official website. However, before applying candidates must chek the cousre wise eligibility criteria as per the IIITM's admission guidelines. Candidates can check the eligibility, selection & fee for some of thepopular programmes at IIITM Gwaliorin the table below:
Popular Courses
Eligibility Criteria
Selection Criteria
Class 12 with 75% aggregate
JEE Main+JoSAA Counselling
Bachelor's degree with 60% aggregate
Download:FREECMAT Mock Test papers & solutions
Bachelor'sdegree with 60%
GATE+CCMT Counselling
*This information is taken from the official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

IIITM Gwalior fee has multiple components, out of which certain components are paid one-time while others are paid semester-wise. The components include tuition fees, caution deposits, hostel and mess charges, etc. Mentioned below is IIITM Gwalior course-wise fee breakup:
*This information is taken from the official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change. Check out completeIIITM Gwalior Fee Structure

Candidates are willing to get seats at IIITM Gwalior seat are required to go through various course-level national entrance exams, such as JEE Main or GATE followed by theri couselling for seat allocation. The seat intake for all the UG and PG courses offered at IIITM Gwalior is as follows:
*This information is taken from the official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

Candidates must follow IIITM Gwaloir admission procedure for admission to their desired courses. Admission to the IPG, MTech, and MBA are done once a year as per the guidelines framed by MHRD, Government. As for the BTech programme admission is conducted under DASA scheme. Find below the IIITM admission process 2025:
1. IIITM Application process
Candidates must register themselves on the official website of IIITM Gwalior. They must first register and then fill out the online application form.
2. IIITM Shortlisting
Applicants are shortlisted as per the fulfillment of the eligibility criteria and scores obtained in the entrance exams. JEE Main, GATE, and CAT are the exams accepted by IIITM Gwalior
3. IIITM Selection Process
The shortlisted candidates have to participate in the selection phase, which consists of face-to-face and group interviews. The selection process is conducted offline.
4. IIITM Final Selection

IIITM releases a provisional list with finalises candidate's name. Candidates must pay the admission fee and confirm their seats. They must visit the admission fee for documnets verification and fee payment before or on the provided date.

faqs.answer: Yes, IIITM Gwalior allows admission to the MBA course through CMAT. faqs.question: How to take admission for M.Tech at IIITM Gwalior?
faqs.answer: IIITM Gwalior offers a two-year M.Tech course at the postgraduate level. IIITM Gwalior admission to the MTech  course usually starts in the month of March-April after the GATE exam result declaration. The final selection is based on the GATE scores followed byCCMT counselling. The centralised CCMT counselling process for offering admission to M.Tech is done through online mode. Selected candidates have to further report at the institute to complete formalities for admission confirmation.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission in IIITM Gwalior?
faqs.answer: To apply for IIITM Gwalior, aspirants must first visit the official website of the individual entrance test for the courses to which they wish to apply. For example, aspirants must apply on the official JEE Main website to get admitted to BTech. Candidates must pass the GATE test in order to be admitted to the M.Tech programme. Eligibility for the GATE exam requires a minimum of 60% in graduation.

faqs.question: What rank is required for IIITM Gwalior?
faqs.answer: IIITM admits students to its BTech and dual degree programmes based on their JEE Mains marks; however, students seeking MTech admission must meet the IIITM Gwalior GATE cut-off. To be eligible for the next stage of admissions, students must fulfil the IIITM Gwalior cut-off for their particular category. The total number of seats available for admissions at IIITM Gwalior, the total number of applications submitted for the test, the category-wise distribution of students, and other criteria all influence the cut-off for a given year. faqs.question: What can students do after JEE Main session 2 result?
faqs.answer: After JEE session 2 is completed, only those candidates who are aiming for IITs need to start preparing for JEE Advanced after clearing JEE Main. Those who are above the 98th percentile should start preparing for JEE Advanced as soon as possible. Those below this, between the 95th and 98th percentile, should focus on attempting more mock tests and previous year question papers so that they have a better chance of clearing JEE Advanced

description: IIITM Gwalior cutoff 2025 for BTech, MTech, and other courses are available on this page. Candidates preparing for the next academic session can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the IIITM Gwalior JEE Main cutoff 2025 along with other exams for different courses, rounds, and categories. Further exam-related updates are below:

In this section, candidates can view the last 9 years of IIIT Gwalior JEE Main cutoff ranks for various courses and categories by clicking on the download now links provided below to understand the past years' trends.

IIITM Gwalior JEE Main cutoff 2025 for the first and last rounds are tabulated below for the General AI category students. In the last round, the IIITM Gwalior CSE cutoff 2025 was 11201 in the General category belonging to the AI quota. The cutoff ranks for core BTech branches are usually on the lower side, indicating competitive cutoff rank for admission.

For the General AI category students, the IIITM Gwalior B.E. / B.Tech cutoff 2025 ranged between 11201 and 22339 in the last round. Considering the lowest cutoff ranks of 11201 and 14447, B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering and B.Tech. in Mathematics and Scientific Computing were the top two most competitive branches for admission among the students belonging to the General category.

JEE Main is the accepting exam for admission to the BTech and other UG courses. Qualified candidates are then eligible for the JoSAA and CSAB counselling process for final seat allocation. In this section, aspirants can find out all the important JEE Main 2026 dates to be eligible for admission.

JoSAA counselling 2025 is now over for admission to the Engineering courses offered at IIITM Gwalior. In 2025, the JoSAA counselling was conducted for up to six rounds. Further counselling rounds were conducted by CSAB to fill the vacant seats. Students who appeared for the JoSAA and CSAB counselling rounds can refer to the table below to view or download the round- and year-wise JEE Main cutoff lists for BTech admission at IIITM Gwalior to understand the cutoff trends.

Tabulated below are the BTech specialisations available for admission based on the last round closing ranks of JEE Main. This will help students to make an informed decision to get the right college and specialisation for admission. The options below are available for students belonging to the General AI quota and are in the range of the most competitive BTech specialisation of IIITM Gwalior. To refine their searches, students can also use the provided filters.

IIITM Gwalior cutoff 2024 is released for admission to the MBA course based on CMAT Scores. Candidates who meet the CMAT 2024 cut off are considered for the next round of MBA admission 2025-26 batch. Also, the IIITM Gwalior cutoff is considered based on various factors, including the number of seats in the institute, the number of candidates who have appeared for the CMAT exam, the difficulty level of the exam and the number of candidates who have passed the exam. Going by the last few years' tr
Candidates can check the consolidated lists for IIITM Gwalior MBA course for the last three years in the table below:

As per the GATE cutoff 2025, the top two most challenging M.E./M.Tech specialisations were Integrated M.Tech. + Ph.D. in Computer Science and Engineering and M.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering with last round cutoff scores of 534 and 529, respectively, for the General AI quota. In the table below, candidates can view the branch-wise first and last round cutoff scores.

Tabulated below are the GATE CCMT last round cutoff scores for 2025, 2024 and 2023 across different rounds, categories and quotas. For the General AI quota, the last round cutoff scores varied between 370 and 534. While for the OBC category students, the final round cutoff scores were concluded between the range of 327 and 486 in the AI quota.

Candidates can refer to the table below to view some of the important GATE 2026 dates to be eligible for admission to the ME/MTech course. GATE is the accepting exam, followed by the CCMT counselling process for admission.

Tabulated below are the GATE cutoff lists across different rounds and years for ME/MTech admission at Atal Bihari Vajpayee Indian Institute of Information Technology and Management. The consolidated cutoff list will help students understand the past years cutoff trends.

IIITM Gwalior CCMN cutoff 2026 is yet to be released for admission to the MSc/MSc Tech courses. In the meantime, candidates can refer to the table below to view the specialisation-wise 2025 cutoff details for the General AI category students. During the IIITM Gwalior MSc cutoff 2025, the last round closing rank was 648. Of all the specialisations, the one with the lowest cutoff rank of 648 was M.Sc. in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science in the General AI category. This indicates that this

The maximum cutoff rank required for MSc admission was 648 in the General AI quota. This indicates that students with a cutoff rank below the mentioned rank here have higher chances of getting admission to their desired specialisations. The cutoff ranks vary across different rounds, categories and specialisations.
Among the OBC category students, the CCMN last round closing rank was 1958, with M.Sc. in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science being the most competitive for admission. Choose the p

CCMN is the centralised platform for admissions to the MSc and MSc (Tech Programmes) at NITs, IIEST Shibpur, and some CFTI institutes that accept the IIT JAM scorecard. This year, CCMN counselling was conducted for three regular rounds and two special rounds for MSc admission across different participating institutes. Candidates preparing for IIITM Gwalior admission can refer to the table below to view or download the year- and round-wise CCMN cutoff list.

DASA UG Round 2 Seat Allotment for IIITM Gwalior admissions 2023 to BTech course has been the concluding round. IIITM Gwalior DASA UG cutoff 2023 was released only for B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering, B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering can be considered the most competitive one, considering the last round closing ranks. During the IIITM Gwalior cutoff 2023 the last round closing rank stood at 343531 for B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering, while in 2022, the last rou

Considering the last round of IIITM Gwalior CCMT cutoff 2025, core M.E./M.Tech branches, including Computer Science and Engineering and Computer Science and Engineering, witnessed higher cutoffs for admission, while branches such as Information Technology and Cyber Security and Cyber laws had comparatively relaxed cutoff scores for admission in the General category under the AI quota.

highlights.description: One of India’s leading institutes is IIITM Gwalior. It has been consistently recognised by numerous national ranking agencies. As per the NIRF 2025, the institute ranked #96 under Engineering category, and #93 under Management. IIITM Gwalior excellence in academics, distinguished professors, and well-established infrastructure is the reason for its high ranks among numerous ranking agencies. All the information around IIITM Gwalior rankings is covered in the following article:

rankings.highlight: 3rd Best Among NIRF Ranked Colleges In Madhya Pradesh In 2025
2nd Best Among NIRF Ranked Colleges In Madhya Pradesh In 2025

nirf.description:
As per the overall score, IIITM Gwalior has been placed at a good position by the NIRF under the 'Engineering' category, reflecting its exceptional performance in areas like Teaching, Research, Graduation Outcomes, and creating an inclusive, quality learning environment. When compared to the ranking from the previous years, it has been seen that in the 'Engineering' category, the institute's ranks have shown a fluctuating trend. In 2025, IIITM Gwalior climbed 5 ranks to #96 rank in the 'Engineering' category by the NIRF ranking.
One can observe that within the category of 'Management', the institute's ranking has fallen when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, IIITM Gwalior fell 8 ranks to #93 rank in the 'Management' category by the NIRF ranking. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has slipped in the rankings.
Explore the most recent rankings from other ranking bodies and their respective categories below.
Read less

outlook.description:
IIITM Gwalior has been recognised for its excellence in various fields by Outlook-ICARE 2024, outperforming other institutes in parameters such as Teaching, Graduation Outcome, Inclusivity & Research, as well as fostering an exceptional learning environment. It is observable that in the 'MBA (Government)' category, the institute's ranks have shown a decreasing trend when evaluated against the ranking of the prior year. In 2024, IIITM Gwalior fell 7 ranks to #23 rank in the 'MBA (Government)' category by the Outlook-ICARE ranking.

hostel.description: Hostels are equipped with all the basic amenities like a mess, computer network connected with wireless internet, reading room, games etc. Telephone facility is also available in all the hostels. A well-equipped gymnasium is also available in the hostel.
facilities: Library: It is meant for students of various programmes and institute faculty members to issue relevant books, periodicals, etc. The library has a rich collection of books and journals.

library.description: Atal Bihari Vajpayee Indian Institute of Information Technology and Management (ABV-IIITM) has a well-equipped library with around 30000 books, 69 national and international journals, 55 magazines and 1050 completed theses, 18 online journals, 225 annual reports, 3021 CDs and DVDs and is subscribed to UGC-INFONET or INFLIBNET, DELNET, INDEST AICTE.
