reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure, strong academics, and decent placements at IIIT, Gwalior.
reviews.review_text: The department has well-equipped labs, smart classrooms, a library, and campus-wide Wi-Fi. Hostels are decent with basic facilities, food quality is average, medical care is available, and sports facilities support indoor and outdoor games and others.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the facilities provided, and the placement is really good and improving every year.
reviews.review_text: The hostels for first-year students are more recently built, hence are better than any college compared. The hostels that are allotted for the later-year students are old. There are lots of things which don't meet the expectations, like the old fan connections and all. The mess is pretty decent for all hostels. Wi-Fi and LAN connections sometimes have a few little fluctuations, like any other college, but overall, they are nice.

reviews.review_heading: First established the IIIT under the MOE.
reviews.review_text: We have a library with AC equipped in it, and we also have a Wi-Fi-enabled campus reaching 50 Mbps in the worst areas. Labs are very well-equipped, and the computer lab is the best of all, having the best configuration of systems and almost more than 200 PCs of that configuration that are very easily accessible.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure and placements.
reviews.review_text: Library is very good. All kinds of books are available there, and you can also issue books for yourself. Wi-Fi routers are provided, and internet speed is also quite good. Classrooms are air-conditioned. Labs are also maintained properly. Food is not as good as it should be, and in mess after sometimes quality degrades. There are 3 canteens where you can eat. Medical facilities are available. There is a doctor present at his time, and you can consult him in case of small injuries.

reviews.review_heading: Large campus area, top-notch placements, hostels and mess food can be improved.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good, but the boys hostels are not so good because the hostels require renovation as they get older. All the necessary facilities are available for living in hostels, like Wi-Fi (sometimes there may be some problem but mostly good with upto 80-90 Mbps speed), classrooms are fully air-conditioned with proper sitting arrangements, and library is also there, which is also fully air-conditioned. Mess food is okay. Medical facilities are available, whenever required. All the sports ...

reviews.review_heading: Fantastic placements in 2025, but I am dissatisfied with the hostel.
reviews.review_text: We have a huge library and labs for each professor and their research. We also have Wi-Fi in hostels and in the academic block, where all the departments and lecture halls are present. We have various types of classrooms of differing capacities, ranging from 60 to 200, some of which have plug points at each seat. Each classroom is enabled by Wi-Fi. The first-year hostel is very good, and the hostels from the 2nd year onwards are average. The mess quality keeps varying, but it is mostly good. The...

reviews.review_heading: Strong academics and good placements, but infrastructure and campus life need improvement.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is not very good, but as this is the oldest IIIT, it has the infrastructure of 1997, so it’s pretty old. New hostels are definitely good and well-equipped, while the old ones are okay. There are also some hostels in progress, which seem pretty good. The library is very good, and the classrooms have AC installed.

reviews.review_heading: IIIT Gwalior - A perfect college.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good; a new hostel is also under construction and is expected to be completed by 2026. A new hospital is also being built. We have a huge college divided into two parts: Pockets A and Pockets B, connected with an underpass. The infrastructure is very cool. In the hostel, we get 24/7 internet, also wireless, so you are always connected to the internet. Coolers are allowed, and we have fully air-conditioned lecture halls, classrooms, and a library.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied, as it provides good campus life, lovely fests, active clubs, excellent placements, etc.
reviews.review_text: I would say the infrastructure is old. The obvious reason is this is the oldest IT, so the buildings are pretty old. But the interior of the academic buildings is good. Also, the library is very nice here. With its infrastructure and vast variety of books, this library has everything you need. Hostels are a little on the low side. For first-year students, hostels are pretty good, but after the first year, you get either single or double sharing rooms. The rooms are okay, not so good I would say,...

reviews.review_heading: Average plus a good college.
reviews.review_text: Facilities available are Wi-Fi, labs, air-conditioned classrooms, and a big library named LRC. Mess food is average. There is a big sports complex, a cricket ground, a swimming pool, and many clubs.

reviews.review_heading: Don't expect much; you will be disappointed and good in terms of placement.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms and library are good. Many useful books are available in the library. Labs are okay, average. Hostel is not much good but adjustable. No Wi-Fi is good here, and the mess food is bad; it's below average. The sports club is good, and it's okay for playing sports. Canteens are available to eat your favourite food. Canteens are also not the best but average.

reviews.review_heading: Really happy to take the course. Also happy to see the placements of this year.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is well maintained. All the rooms and labs are air conditioned. We have WiFi at our hostels and classes. We have full access to them. Sometimes the internet is not stable. Overall, it works fine. The food quality totally depends upon the mess committee. Sometimes responses are taken late. There are also cases of food poisoning as well.

reviews.review_heading: Good college but sometimes regret choosing this college because of a few circumstances.
reviews.review_text: The buildings are a bit old. Well, there are a total of 5 hostels for boys and one hostel for girls. Among the five hostels there are two for the first years of B.Tech and the remaining three are for the second, fourth, and fifth years and M.Tech and Ph.D. students.

reviews.review_heading: The institute has a peaceful vibe and is quite big compared to other IIITs.
reviews.review_text: First-year students got a separate hostel called SATPURA, which is situated just outside the main campus. It's a 3-seater hostel. Wi-Fi, particularly in hostels, is very poor; we get very low internet speed. The library building is quite big but has books only related to the courses available, as it has much space to accommodate more books. Classrooms and labs are quite good.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with the faculty members and placements. Average in mess and Wi-Fi.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is not so good. It lags too much, labs are well-equipped and have all the things that are required for doing any experiments. Classrooms are too good, they have comfy seats, a central AC system, projectors, and good sound system. Mess food is average but canteen food is way better than it. Colleges have several canteens that provide both vegetarian and non-vegetarian food to students at a minimal cost. Medical facilities are good, they have all types of medicines. If they do not have a sol...

college_info.intro: SOT PDEU popular programmes are BTech and MTech. BTech and MTech students are placed in top companies at top positions such as IBM, Reliance, Google, Micron, Amazon, Paypal, and others. BTech students can become Full Stack Developers, Software Architects, Machine Learning Engineers, Blockchain Developers, or can go for various other job profiles. Students opting for BTech course will be able to learn modern tools such as different computer softwares, modern instrumentation for understanding the limitations of engineering activities and others. Overall, SOT PDEU is one of the top colleges offering quality education to students. Below mentioned are some of the SOT PDEU courses and their respective eligibility and SOT PDEU fee structure:

paragraphs: SOT Pandit Deendayal Energy University admissionsare primarily entrance-based. SOT accepts national-level entrance exams such asJEE Main,GATE, etc. for admission to specific courses.SOT PDEUconducts awritten testfor MSc admission. The school offers UG, PG and doctoral programmes in Science and Engineering streams. Interested candidates can apply online for the preferred course.

School of Technology under PDEU offers BTech and BSc (Hons) at the UG level and MSc and MTech at the PG level. Candidates are offered admission in UG and PG programmes based on their entrance exam scores. Below are the key highlights forSOT PDEU admissions:

PDEU offers BTech, MTech, BSc, MSc and PhD programmes in various specialisations. Admission to these programmes is based on national-level entrance exam scores. A minimum of Class 12 is required to apply for UG and graduation for PG programmes. The table below lists all theSOT PDEU coursesalong with their eligibility and selection criteria:
Course Name

Selection Criteria

SOT PDEU admissionsbegin with registration. Candidates need to apply for the course of their choice. SOT PDEU accepts national-level entrance exams or conducts written test for admission to courses. Find below the step-wise :
STEP 1: SOT PDEU Application Process 2025SOT PDEU admission process

Candidates who are applying for All India Quota seats for BTech and MTech need to register on the official website of the university. For Government seats, aspirants must apply on the official website of TheAdmission Committee for Professional Courses (ACPC)Gujarat. For all other courses, aspirants need to apply on the official website of SOT PDEU. Aspirants need to pay an application fee to register for a course.
STEP 2: Selection

SOT PDEU selects candidates for most of the programmes based on entrance exam scores. The school acceptsJEE Mainfor BTech andGATEfor MTech programmes. Non-GATE-qualified candidates are selected based on personal interview rounds. SOT conducts written tests for MSc and PhD programmes. For BSc, selection is based on merit in the last qualifying exam and performance of the candidates in the personal interview round.
STEP 3: Merit List and Admission Confirmation

The university releases a merit list based on the performance of the candidates in the selection rounds. The seats in BTech and MTech programmes are offered under All India Quota and ACPC Quota. Selected candidates need to pay theSOT PDEU feeto confirm their seats.
Below are the documents required for BTech at the time of admission:

faqs.answer: SOT PDEU application forms are out in the month of January. Candidates applying for BTech admission at SOT PDEU can start applying from January. The application forms are usually open till end of May, therefore candidates can also apply once Class 12 or JEE Main results are announced.

faqs.question: What is the fees of SOT PDEU BSc?
faqs.answer: Candidates who get admission to the BSc programme offered at SOT Pandit Deendayal Energy Universityare required to pay theSOT PDEU BSc feeswhich ranges between INR 3.6 Lacs and INR 60 lakh* depending upon the specialisation selected.*Note: This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

faqs.question: How can I take admission in SOT PDEU?
faqs.answer: Candidates are first required to register for the programme of their choice at SOT PDEU. The school shortlists candidates for most of the courses based on entrance exam scores. SOT PDEU acceptsJEE Mainor GUJCET for BTech andGATEfor M.Tech programmes. Non-GATE qualified candidates are selected based on qualifying exam score and PI round. Besides, SOT conducts written test for MSc and PhD programmes. For BSc admission, both merit and PI round is considered.

faqs.question: Is entrance exam required for admission to SOT PDEU?
faqs.answer: Yes, SOT PDEU accepts national-level entrance exam or conducts written test to shortlist candidates for admission to various courses. Only for BSc (Hons) merit in the last qualifying exam or performance in the personal interview round is considered for admission. Below are the entrance exam accepted for SOR PDEU admission:Course NameAccepted Entrance ExamBTechJEE Main/ GUJCET (For Biotechnology)MTechGATE/ PIMScWritten TestPhDUGC-NET/ CSIR/ SLET/ GATE/ WAT

faqs.question: What is the eligibility for SOT PDEU?
faqs.answer: SOT PDEU offers UG and PG programmes, namely BTech, MTech, BSc and MSc. Candidates need to fulfil the eligibility requirement to apply for any of the programme. Below is course-wise eligibility:Course NameCommon EligibilityBTechClass 12 with at least45% aggregate(40% aggregate for SC/ ST) in theory and practical of Physics and Mathematics (with Chemistry or Vocational subject as per the guidelines of ACPC)Candidates with Biology in Class 12 can apply for BiotechnologyMTechBE/ BTecg with at least50% aggregate or CPI/ CGPA of 5.5 in 10point scale in the qualifying degree in relevant subjectsBSc (Hons)Class 12MScGraduation in Science or Technology with a minimum 50% aggregate of all semesters/ years or CPI 5.5 on 10 point scale or equivalent scorePhDMaster's or bachelor's degree in relevant subjects with at least 55% aggregate or its equivalent grade in a point scale (50% aggregate for SC / ST / OBC-NCL/ Differently-Abled, Economically Weaker Section)

faqs.question: Can I get admission at SOT PDEU with 60% in Class 12?
faqs.answer: Candidates can apply for BTech and BSc programmes with a Class 12 score. The minimum aggregate required in Class 12 is 45% for BTech. The school has not specified it for BSc. Hence, aspirants with 60% in Class 12 can apply for UG admission provided they also fulfil the selection requirements. Aspirants need to pass JEE Main or GUJCET for admission to BTech course.

placement_data.title: SOT PDEU Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: SOT PDEU has a placement cell responsible for securing lucrative career opportunities for students. The institute invites companies from different sectors to conduct the placement process at the Campus premises. The placed students also get the opportunity to do their final project in the placed company as an intern with stipend at this phase. After successful completion of the internship, the students can get full-time employment.

SOT PDEU concluded the placements for the Class of 2024 with 90% placements . As per the latest report, the highest and average package offered during SOT PDEU placements in 2024 stood at INR 42 LPA and INR 7.5 LPA , respectively. Further, over 175 recruiters participated in 2024 placements and offered over 550 jobs to the students of the 2024 batch. The top recruiters of SOT, Pandit Deendayal Energy University in 2024 included IBM, Reliance, Google, Micron, Amazon, Paypal, JP Morgan Chase, Goldman Sachs, ONGC, ITC, L&T, Adani Group, Worley, Tata Group, etc.

description: SoT, Pandit Deendayal Energy University (PDEU) cutoff 2025 is finally out for candidates seeking admission to BTech and BPharma programs. The GUJCET cutoff has been released for all categories and rounds for students belonging to the HS and AI quota. Candidates can also view other exam cutoffs from the exam-wise sections given below. Further updates are down below:

The SoT, Pandit Deendayal Energy University (PDEU) cutoff 2024 was concluded for JEE Main with the release of the final cutoff list. The cutoff was released as the opening and closing ranks for admission to the BE/BTech, courses. During the SoT, Pandit Deendayal Energy University (PDEU) BE/BTech cutoff 2024, the last-round closing ranks ranged between 900152 and 906020 for the General AI category students. Of all the BE/BTech specialisations, the one that faced fierce competition was B.Tech. in

The JEE Main cutoff 2024 was released for the General, OBC, ST, SC, EWS, and PWD categories in the AI quota. Considering the last round 2024 cutoff, B.Tech. in Computer Science and Business Systems was the most sought-after BE/BTech specialization with a closing rank of 900152 for the general AI quota.
On the contrary the least competitive specialisations for admission in 2024 were B.Tech. in Civil Engineering and with closing cutoff ranks of and

SoT, Pandit Deendayal Energy University (PDEU) JEE Main cutoff 2024 is now over for BTech, Integrated BTech, and BArch courses. For JEE Main, a total of five counselling rounds were conducted. Additionally, two CSAB counselling rounds were also conducted to fill the vacant seats. Candidates can refer to the table below to download the consolidated year-wise counselling rounds for SoT, Pandit Deendayal Energy University (PDEU).

SoT, Pandit Deendayal Energy University (PDEU) GUJCET cutoff 2025 concluded with the final round cutoff list being published for various All India and Home State quota categories, like General, OBC, SC, etc. The cutoff was released for admission to B.E./ B.Tech course.
For the General HS category, the overall B.E./ B.Tech cutoff ranged from 1382 to 15242. According to the last round, the most competitive branch for admission was , followed by

This section provides the closing ranks for 2025, 2024, and 2023 for various categories, rounds, courses, and quotas. Students can refer to the table below to know the cutoff trend for the past 3 years.

In the final round for the General HS category, the SoT, Pandit Deendayal Energy University (PDEU) B.E./ B.Tech cutoff 2025 ranged from 1382 to 15242, wherein the toughest branch was B.Tech. in Computer Engineering.

Provided below are the GUJCET last three years, i.e., 2025, 2024 and 2023 cutoff data for all rounds for students to compare and get a better understanding of the admission changes and trends over the years, so that they have a better comprehension of how to prepare for their admissions for the upcoming year.

hostel.description:
There are seven fully functional hostel blocks which are Wi-Fi enabled, these include emergency medical facilities, a doctor on call, 24x7 access to computer labs and a well
equipped and comfortable lounge to facilitate group activities. Also offers furnished hostel rooms on a twin occupancy basis. This is an optional facility offered
to B.Tech students.

library.description: The Library and Information Centre [LIC] provides the ideal ambience for production and dissemination of knowledge, information, insights and intellect across schools of the University. The Library holds a huge collection of printed as well electronic resources which include books, journals, databases, CDs/DVDs, e-journals, reports, case studies, conference proceedings, training manuals, etc. The LIC is made user-friendly by using Information Technology services such as OPAC for checking online availability and online book reservation. It is ensured that the resources are easily accessible to the users, remote access to e-resources and online databases are also made available.

It is ensured that the resources are easily accessible to the users, remote access to e-resources and online databases are also made available.

reviews.review_heading: Life at PDEU is comfy, and education is good.
reviews.review_text: All facilities are available. There are good classrooms, all classrooms are well ventilated, good seats, comfy environment, a projector, every student gets their personal charging point and Wi-Fi, there are two big libraries in PDEU with all the books you know.

reviews.review_heading: Greater infrastructure of the college.
reviews.review_text: We have clean and big classroom for study. The nature of the campus is very friendly and familiar. Hostel and mess also have great facilities, like our hostel has Wi-Fi, hot water, attached bathroom, etc. All these facilities are given to us at this college. They also have facilities like library, computer lab, physics and chemistry labs, which are really helpful for our studies.

reviews.review_heading: Good college with AC classrooms and a big campus with different clubs and activities.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are good and the best infrastructure among colleges in Gujarat. Library having AC, Wi-Fi, computer, book, etc., for study. Mess and canteen food is good, medical, and sports facilities are best. All types of indoor and outdoor sports are available for students.

reviews.review_heading: 50 shades of PDEU, which describe PDEU.
reviews.review_text: Our college infrastructure is very new and good for studying and living. There are many places to spend time relaxing with friends. There is also apple lab in our college which is very good. Mess and hostel are very good compared to any other college hostel. There are medical facilities, sports, games, and mess facility provided by the college.

reviews.review_heading: Great placements, awesome infrastructure, and supportive faculty. I'm loving my college experience.
reviews.review_text: The facilities at my university are amazing. We've got Wi-Fi all over campus, and the labs are super equipped with industrial-level machinery. The classrooms are comfortable and have smart boards. The library's huge, with tons of books and digital resources. The hostels are pretty cool too. It has AC, and the food is good. We've got a medical clinic on campus, and the sports complex is awesome, with courts for basketball, football, and more. The gym is well-equipped, and there are plenty of extr...

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college and has great placements.
reviews.review_text: PDEU has 2 hostels. UG for 1st and 2nd year students and High Rise for 3rd and 4th year students. All rooms have 3 sharing. All rooms are provided with high-speed Wi-Fi. High Rise has many grounds, a basketball court, and a badminton court. The mess food is average. It is not bad, but it is not super good either. PDEU has a huge campus and many labs equipped with the latest tech, a huge library with all the required books for the courses. All classrooms have AC, projectors, and good benches.

reviews.review_heading: Life at Pandit Deendayal Energy University.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms, Wi-Fi, library, open areas, washrooms, and labs are all very good in condition. Especially labs are fully working and well-equipped with instruments and required equipment. Talking about the mess food, it is good, healthy, and a little bit tasty.

reviews.review_heading: The college is great for studying and has a great campus and social life.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are great. Each hostel room has an AC and there is no electricity bill. It is filled with greenery and has a gym and a badminton court. It has a ton of places to hang out with friends. The infrastructure of the campus is great too. There is an entire separate sports complex for playing.

reviews.review_heading: The college provides the best facilities and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: In our college, there are facilities like free Wi-Fi, well equipments in labs, and all labs have advanced machinery. The computer lab has an i7 system, which we can use at any time. The classrooms are very neat and clean, and create a learning environment. PDPU has 3 libraries for different streams, like SOT, SLS, and SOM, with enough books available in physical and on the PDPU library website. All the facilities available in PDPU like a mess, hostel, and sports. There is 1 cricket ground, footb...

reviews.review_heading: All you need to know before taking admission in PDEU.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure at PDEU is top-notch with the latest equipment, labs, and amenities. Hostels in PDEU have modern infrastructure including air conditioning. The quality of the mess food in PDEU is above average, with a variety of food being served along with a grievance redressal system.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the placements, faculty, campus life, and the excellent infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The university has multiple computer labs equipped with the latest hardware and software, including an Apple lab for advanced projects and research. The library is well-stocked with a vast collection of books, journals, and digital resources to support students' academic needs.

reviews.review_heading: PDEU is one of the best colleges in Gujarat for CSE students, and its facilities are good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of PDEU is the best. They provide Wi-Fi across the entire campus area. The campus is clean, tobacco-free, and full of greenery. Each lab and classroom has AC and projectors. The library also has AC and a collection of books. Hostels, a canteen, and medical facilities are available on campus. There are sports grounds, including a volleyball court, football field, cricket ground, badminton court, and more.

reviews.review_heading: Really good college placement and the infrastructure is very good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the University is also very good there is a library as well as on campus. Which helps students to provide a good environment for the study. There are also good facilities for the mess and also the canteen there is also a good sports complex in the university there are some sports events in the university.

reviews.review_heading: PDEU - A perfect balance of academic life and extracurricular opportunities.
reviews.review_text: PDEU infrastructure has high-speed internet everywhere on the campus. The campus is clean and green. The air here is very fresh. The flora and greenery on the campus are maintained on regular basis. There are many places where we can hangout with friends. Mess and canteen provide a good quality of food. I am a local light so I don't know about the hostel facilities. But I have heard from my friends that the hostels are affordable and provide good facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Inside life of PDEU, must join.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are very good, and the infrastructure of the college is also very nice. There is greenery everywhere, and NAAC also rated PDEU as A+ recently. The labs are good, and the whole campus has PDEU Wi-Fi. The hostel facilities are decent, and the mess and campus food is hygienic.

data.description: SOT PDEU offers residential facility on campus. Each hostel block of the SOT PDEU offers a variety of academic and social oriented activities. Living in an SOT PDEU hostel is quite comfortable for students. Students feel happy living in these hostels as the college provides all the necessary facilities to students.

admission_process.title: Chennai Institute of Technology Admission Process 2026

paragraphs: Chennai Institute of Technology admissions 2026are based on anentrance examinationto make the process of registration fair and transparent. View the fulladmission procedurein the Chennai Institute of Technology below.

Application:The process istotally online. Applicants are required to create an account on thecollege's official site, completeonline formwith personal and academic information, upload necessary documents, and pay theapplication feein order to be registered.

Selection rounds:Applicants have to attend the respective entrance examinations and, after that take part in theTNEA counselling process. According to the rounds of counselling and their performance, the seats are assigned to the candidates who in turn, must await thedeclaration of results and merit lists.

Confirmation of admission:Once the selection processes are done, those shortlisted are called to verify the documents. After the verification, aspirants will have to pay the specifiedcourse feeto attain a seat and accept admission at the Chennai Institute of Technology.

sports.description: The College provides ample facilities for the students to participate in sports and games in College, University, District, State and National level competitions. The College also organises various sports and games on our campus. Outdoor and indoor games facilities available on the campus are effectively used by the students during and after college hours. The college organises an event named "CIT TROPY" every year, and it welcomes many colleges to participate in this event. The outdoor games activities are:

reviews.review_heading: The college that helps to develop skills and gives good placements
reviews.review_text: Our college has many facilities, like Wi-Fi, and the classrooms are equipped with smart boards. So, teachers could teach the concepts in PPT and video format. We have around 5-6 labs dedicated to our department. We had practical demonstrations of the experiments.

reviews.review_heading: The college that provides 100% placement continuously with a friendly environment
reviews.review_text: In our department, the classrooms are well-equipped with Wi-Fi and smart boards. The classes have been taught through PPT and video that explain the concept. We have access to a library with many IEEE papers and books related to the subject.

reviews.review_heading: Comprehensive insights into the faculty, placement, and infrastructure of CIT.
reviews.review_text: Chennai Institute of Technology (CIT) offers a well-maintained campus with modern labs and good learning facilities. Hostels are safe, inside the campus, and provide a student-friendly environment with decent amenities. Overall, CIT gives a comfortable campus life with good academics and supportive infrastructure.

reviews.review_heading: College has good placements, good campus life, and good facilities.
reviews.review_text: There are more than 30 facilities in each department, and more than 5 come to each department. Wi-Fi connections are moderate. There are more than 15 wardens in the hostel. Hostel food is average, a Medical room is available, a PT room is available, and competitions will be conducted.

reviews.review_heading: I'm satisfied with placement, CoE availability and good campus life.
reviews.review_text: All sources mentioned are available in good quality. The hostel is available in good infrastructure with laundry facilities, and Wi-Fi is available. The food quality at the mess is good. The quality of the canteen, sports and games and medical facilities is nice too. The competitions will be conducted both technically and non-technically.

reviews.review_heading: Good college offering great placement opportunities and a vibrant ecosystem.
reviews.review_text: The campus is good comprising numerous classrooms and labs with good Wi-Fi connectivity. Our department has labs with smart boards and updated software for my course. Bus routes are available for day scholars with the majority of the buses being air conditioned.

reviews.review_heading: My college and my course review.
reviews.review_text: Non-AC classrooms are available for my department, the mess food is good, and the medical facilities are available. Good quality of food available in this college with time restrictions. The college management conducts a sports program once a month, and many students participated in the outside tournament.

reviews.review_heading: Find the best experience with CIT - From classroom to career.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms are spacious, and the campus offers free Wi-Fi. The labs are extraordinary, and the COEs are very excellent. They have kept the central library accessible to students at any time. The hostel facilities are quite good; the Wi-Fi is enabled even when the power is off, and the laundry services are very great and useful for the hostel students.

reviews.review_heading: Good academics and excellent facilities.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are equipped with smart boards that help us to learn and explore new things, and also provide uninterrupted internet access. The department also includes regular lab usage for improving practical knowledge. The hostel provides a safe, comfortable living environment with hygienic food, water, electricity, a gym, sports, and medical support.

reviews.review_heading: Student life at CIT Chennai.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure at CIT Chennai is quite good. It has well equipped labs, smart classrooms, and campus-wide Wi-Fi. Hostel facilities are comfortable. It has decent rooms and regular maintenance. The food in the mess is decent. Though it could have more variety. The college has modern infrastructure suitable for both academics and student life.

reviews.review_heading: Nice exposure towards the international healthcare and medical field.
reviews.review_text: Our biomedical engineering department offers advanced labs, smart classrooms, Wi-Fi, and a vast library. The hostel of Chennai Institute of Technology provides clean food, nutritious food, and 24/7 medical aid during emergencies. The quality of food in the mess and canteen is very hygienic and has many varieties according to students' interests.

reviews.review_heading: Placement guaranteed! Best college for biomedical engineering!
reviews.review_text: I am a hosteller, staying within the campus. Our campus is completely safe, with proper CCTV installed at various places. Caring wardens, health centre, friendly seniors make my college life very memorable, free Wi-Fi around the campus 24/7. CoE can be accessed even in the late evening for our research. All the classrooms have smart boards, enough fans/light and well-aerated rooms.

reviews.review_heading: Great learning environment.
reviews.review_text: Chennai Institute of Technology offers the best infrastructure with advanced labs, innovation centers, and incubation lab. As a hosteller, we can access to COE and labs even after college hours, enhancing practical learning and a place for collaborative learning.

reviews.review_heading: Creating engineers with a vision.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are fitted with smart boards. The campus is fitted with Wi-Fi all over. Spacious and ventilated classrooms. LCD projectors are fitted in all classrooms too. Separate classrooms for each department. Clean environment. Top-class facilities in labs and research centres.

reviews.review_heading: Best and safe campus, good placement & enjoyable student life.
reviews.review_text: I am studying Biomedical Engineering, III year. The biomedical knowledge I gained from my course helped me to study various medical reports with clarity. We have good spacious classrooms and laboratories. I stay in the boys' hostel. At the beginning, I struggled to manage, but as days moved on, I felt more comfortable with the hostel campus and my roommates. Weekly, 4 days the mess provides non-veg meals.

data.description: Chennai Institute of Technology has an experienced faculty who are PhD, diploma, and degree holders. CIT also invites faculty for guest lectures and tries to offer an opportunity for students to talk to some of the best personalities.

faqs.answer: JIIT Noida BTech cutoff 2024 was concluded after the JEE Main Round 5 Seat Allotment result, followed by an additional two rounds of CSAB counselling. The cutoff was released for admission to the BTech, Integrated BTech, and BArch courses. During the JIIT Noida BTech cutoff 2024, the last-round closing ranks varied between 59706 and 129809 for the General AI category students. Talking about the branch-wise cutoff, the most sought-after course in 2024 was B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering with a cutoff rank of 59706, followed by B.Tech. in Mathematics and Computing with 65698.
faqs.question: Q: What are the JEE cutoffs for BTech at JIIT Noida?

faqs.answer: Jaypee Institute of Information Technology (JIIT), Noida, BTech admission is conducted in three different modes. To get admission in the BTech course, candidates can choose any one admission procedure as per their qualification. There are three admission modes:Direct mode: Candidates are offered direct admission based on their score in the Class 12 exam. Candidates must score 75% marks or equivalent, in aggregate in three subjects, i.e., Mathematics, Physics, and English. JEE (UG): Students can also apply for the JEE exam. Common University Entrance Test, also known as JEE UG, is a national-level entrance exam conducted by NTA for admission to UG courses offered by participating institutes. Students should have passed Class 12 from a recognised board in Science or a relevant stream to be admitted to bachelor's degree programs in the Central Universities.Lateral-Entry: Candidates are required to have a valid qualfication and appear for the Lateral Entry Entrance Test for admission to BTech course.

course_faqs.question: Is Jaypee Institute of Information Technology a good choice for BSc?
course_faqs.answer: Compared to many other private colleges, Jaypee has a generally favourable placement situation. People are able to get good positions, and the typical pay, particularly for CSE, is 13 to 14 LPA. Visits from reputable companies like Amazon, Microsoft, and Adobe are common. The majority of people can find internships at businesses like Google, Morgan Stanley, and many more. Packages can reach 52–54 LPA. SWE, Develops, and many other roles are available.

overview_faqs.answer: JIIT Noida is one of the top colleges for engineering in the country. JIIT Noida JEE Main cutoff 2024 was concluded with the release of last round of cutoff results. The cutoff was released for different categories belonging to the All India quota. For the General AI category candidates, the cutoff ranks varied between 59706 and 129809. The most in-demand specialisations were B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering, B.Tech. in Mathematics and Computing and Integrated B.Tech. + M.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering. Looking at the cutoff ranks for these specialisations and most of the other specialisations, there was observed a fluctuating trend in the cutoff.

Students will have to pay INR 20,000 for all programmes (one-time refundable after completion of the programme).

review_summary.college_name: Jaypee Institute of Information Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Dissatisfied about the curriculum, but placements are kind of okay.

content.Placements: Nearly 70 percent of students are placed. Top roles are business analyst and associate consultant. Top companies include startups and mass hirers like Infosys, Cognizant. Companies like Oracle and Amazon also do on-campus visits, and the overall hiring scene is okay.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms depend on buildings; for B. Tech, they are not up to the mark and are in bad shape. Labs are clean and have facilities, but the experiments are bookish and some are not worth it. Food quality is normal, not too bad, but it gets boring after some time.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: JIIT: The ultimate college for placements.

content.Placements: More than 90% of students from the CSE department are placed, and the highest package offered so far is 90 LPA, as reported by LinkedIn. Top recruiters are Google, Microsoft, and Atlassian. Many students got an internship, with some even getting one in the first semester of their first year. Top roles offered are in SWE and SDE.
content.Infrastructure: Hostels are excellent in terms of price, but availability is based on CGPA. Food quality is excellent, and the campus features 24/7 medical facilities, including an ambulance and fire brigade. Wi-Fi speeds are also good. You can get around 50-60 Mbps, and you can access the library and cafe till 10:30 at night.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: It has a supportive environment and experienced faculty members.

content.Placements: Placement season is still going on, and maximum students got internships from the college itself. Top roles offered are business development, executive, financial analyst, business analyst, executive for corporate sales, etc. Top recruiting companies that recruit students from this college are Swiggy, MakeMyTrip, and Naukri.com.
content.Infrastructure: The department has well-maintained classrooms with smart boards and audiovisual teaching aids. There is Wi-Fi connectivity across the department. The computer lab is equipped with an updated system. The library has a good collection of textbooks, reference books, and general books. Seminar halls are also available for presentations and guest lectures.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Very Satisfied, good studies, good environment, good location, and decent crowd.

content.Placements: Placements are excellent, and overall, the training and companies visited are good. The coding culture is, I guess, less active otherwise. If you join the clubs, then it'll be sorted out. Placement and internship opportunities depend more on your efforts if done properly. 12 LPA is very easy to get if you're from CSE in 62.
content.Infrastructure: The campus is not so big, like three buildings in which 1 is a hostel, but properly maintained with all facilities, with smart classrooms, and good food by Annapurna. The sports facilities are okay, and they have three entry gates and a parking area, 1 auditorium in JBS.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mathematics and Computing - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Good Infrastructure and Placements

content.Placements: Well, a good amount of students were placed in the course. The highest package went for 95 LPA, and the lowest is around 4 LPA. The average is going near around 10 LPA. Top recruiting companies include LinkedIn, Zomato, and Google. Top roles offered are data scientist.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure and connectivity are pretty good. It is directly located at Noida Electronic City metro station; thus, it is very easy to travel to. Hostels are also very good. Every single hostel has 2 rooms and AC as well. Classrooms are good, Wi-Fi is good, and I love the library.

admission_overview.college_name: Jaypee Institute of Information Technology Admission 2026: Eligibility, Application Process, Fees

admission_overview.title: JIIT Noida Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: JIIT Noida admission is based on both entrance exam and merit depending on the programme. The Jaypee Institute of Information Technology Noida, aka JIIT Noida, offers UG, PG, and PhD programmes. These are offered in the fields of Engineering & Technology, Design, Arts, Media, and Commerce. The institute offers BTech, MTech and five-year integrated B Tech-MTech as its flagship programmes. The application process can be completed online. Students have to submit scores of national-level entrance tests, such as CUET/ CAT/ JEE Mains to get admission in the institute. Students also have to appear for counselling for selective programmes, such as BTech. Interested students can go through the following sections to know more.

eligibility_selection.title: JIIT Noida Eligibility & Selection 2026
eligibility_selection.description: JIIT Noida course admission is subject to fulfilment of the preset admission criteria. The institute admits students through entrance test scores and/or counselling as applicable. Each programme has different eligibility and selection requirements. Students can either submit national-level entrance test scores or appear for the exams conducted by the institute. JIIT Noida conducts UGET for BTech (lateral entry), BSc CS, BBA, BCA, BCom, Diploma After Class 10. Similarly, it has PGET for MSc, MTech, MCA, MCom, and MDes programmes.

faqs.question: Who is eligible for JIIT Noida admission?

faqs.answer: JIIT Noida JEE Main Cutoff 2024 was released for different BTech and Integrated M.Tech courses. The Cutoff was released for Sector- 62 and Sector-128 Branch. For Sector-128, the most competitive course was BTech in CSE, with the Closing Cutoff of 97883. Therefore, candidate with the JEE Main rank of 97000 can get CSE at JIIT Noida.
faqs.question: How can I get into CSE at JIIT Noida, Sector 128 with a JEE 2024 rank of 97000 as a waiting list candidate?

paragraphs: The admission process for courses at JIIT Noida starts with an eligibility check. Eligible students can then apply online. The other stages include application, selection, and admission confirmation. Check below the steps to complete theJIIT Noida admission process:
JIIT Noida Application Process 2026

Minimum eligibility to apply for BTech programmes is Class 12 pass in science stream or equivalent from a recognised university and minimum eligibility to apply for MTech programmes is a Graduation /BTech or equivalent from a recognised university.
Application Submission
Candidates must apply on the official website of JIT @jiit.ac.in.Candidates need to fill personal and academic details. The form has to be submitted with documents and application fees.
Candidates need to submit documents at the time of admission to JIIT for the verification document round. Candidates must pay theJIIT Noida admission feesof INR 60,000 to confirm their seat.

JIIT Noida charges the course fees in different parts. The total fee has components, such as admission fees, tuition fees, caution deposit, and more. Students have to payINR 60,000initially to block the seat. This fees will be adjusted against the first semester/year fees. The balance amount has to be paid before the date given in the offer letter.
The payment can be completed through cash/ card/ UPI. Check the table below to know about theJIIT Noida feesfor top programmes:
Note: This is taken from official sources and can change.

At Jaypee Institute of Information Technology Noida, seats are offered through entrance + counselling basis mainly. The BTech programme has the highest intake with over 2000 total number of seats. For BTech, 50% of the seats are filled based on JEE Main + counselling and the other 50% is filled through Class 12 merit + counselling.

The vacant seats are inter-transferrable in either categories. Reservation of seats for SC/ ST students is as per the Government of India norms. Students can check the table below to know about theJaypee Institute of Information Technology Noida seats:
Note: This is taken from official sources and can change.
lists: Admission toJIIT’s B Techand 5-year Integrated B Tech + M Tech courses is offered based on JEE rank/score. Students have to go through the online counselling to get admission

ForBiology-based B Techprogrammes (Biotechnology, Bioinformatics only), 50% of seats shall be allotted through JEE rank merit, and rest of the remaining 50% of seats shall be allotted on the basis of merit in Class 12 examination for students having Biology/Biotechnology with Physics in Class 12.Candidates with Biology/Biotechnology, Physics and Maths can apply for both options (i.e JEE JEE-based admissions or Bio-based admissions) by filling out different application forms.

Admission toMTech coursesis granted on the basis of a written test, PGET conducted by the university itself. However, those who have valid GATE scores can get direct admission. Such candidates are exempted from taking the entrance test.
JIIT offersMBAvia Jaypee Business School. Admission to the MBA programme is done on the basis of CAT/MAT/CMAT/XAT/ATMA/GMAT scores. This is followed by GDPI rounds for final selection

placement_report.college_name: Jaypee Institute of Information Technology Placements 2025: Highest Package, Average Package, Top Companies

placement_data.title: Jaypee Institute of Information Technology Noida Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: JIIT Noida has released the placement stats for its BTech batch that passed out in 2025 . The highest package offered during JIIT placements 2025 stood at INR 62 LPA , which was offered by Atlassian . The second-highest package offered by Microsoft, which stood at INR 55.38 LPA . Further, the average and median package offered to BTech students during JIIT placement 2025 stood at INR 11.13 LPA and INR 7.93 LPA , respectively.

A total of 666 offers were provided to 461 BTech CSE participating students , 142 offers to 121 ECE students, 71 offers to 50 IT students, and 25 offers to 26 students. The total percentage of offers during Jaypee Noida placements 2025 stood at 137% .

Jaypee Institute of Information Technology, Noida has a dedicated Placement and Training cell that organizes a campus recruitment training process to train the students through various in-house and out-of-the-house training sessions, including aptitude test, technical test, Group Discussions (GD), mock interviews, workshops, etc. It helps the students to prepare for placement interviews in technical and HR aspects by arranging meetings with professional trainers.

The JoSAA Round 1 seat allotment result 2025 has been released as opening and closing ranks across different categories belonging to the AI and HS quotas. Candidates can scroll down to this page to view the JIIT Noida JEE Main cutoff 2025 for various specialisations and categories. A few more updates are below:

The cutoff was released as opening and closing ranks for different categories of students. For BTech, the Round 1 closing ranks varied between 70921 and 197144, with Computer Science and Engineering being the most competitive for admission. In contrast, B.Tech. in Electronics Engineering (VLSI Design and Technology) with a lenient first-round closing rank of 197

hostel_campus.college_name: Jaypee Institute of Information Technology Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: JIIT has a total number of 5 hostels, 2 for boys and 3 for girls. The overall charge of student’s discipline and hostel administration vests in the chief warden. All hostel rooms are provided with LAN/Wi-Fi connectivity with 24 hours internet through the main server of the academic block. The hostel is also connected with outdoor sports centers for lawn tennis, basketball, volleyball, and badminton. Other facilities include are 24 hour’s electricity supply, water heaters, water freezer etc.

data: BTech, BTech + MTech, BTech lateral entry

library.description: JIIT's Learning Resource Centre is an excellent repository of learning resources. It can accommodate about 700 users at a time. It is fully integrated with the latest barcode technology and international standard library management software - Liberty. The LRC consists of the latest collection of textbooks as well as reference books (approx. 61500), national as well as international peer-reviewed journals, magazines and electronic resources on subject areas covered by the academic curricula of the Institute and other universal knowledge (approx. 357800).

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Swimming Pool, Tennis Court, Volleyball Court, Hockey Field

labs.description: Available Facilities: Computer Lab, Electronics Lab, Language Lab, Physics Lab, Biotechnology Lab, Psychology Lab

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied about the curriculum, but placements are kind of okay.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms depend on buildings; for B. Tech, they are not up to the mark and are in bad shape. Labs are clean and have facilities, but the experiments are bookish and some are not worth it. Food quality is normal, not too bad, but it gets boring after some time.

reviews.review_heading: JIIT: The ultimate college for placements.
reviews.review_text: Hostels are excellent in terms of price, but availability is based on CGPA. Food quality is excellent, and the campus features 24/7 medical facilities, including an ambulance and fire brigade. Wi-Fi speeds are also good. You can get around 50-60 Mbps, and you can access the library and cafe till 10:30 at night.

reviews.review_heading: It has a supportive environment and experienced faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The department has well-maintained classrooms with smart boards and audiovisual teaching aids. There is Wi-Fi connectivity across the department. The computer lab is equipped with an updated system. The library has a good collection of textbooks, reference books, and general books. Seminar halls are also available for presentations and guest lectures.

reviews.review_heading: Very Satisfied, good studies, good environment, good location, and decent crowd.
reviews.review_text: The campus is not so big, like three buildings in which 1 is a hostel, but properly maintained with all facilities, with smart classrooms, and good food by Annapurna. The sports facilities are okay, and they have three entry gates and a parking area, 1 auditorium in JBS.

reviews.review_heading: Good Infrastructure and Placements
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure and connectivity are pretty good. It is directly located at Noida Electronic City metro station; thus, it is very easy to travel to. Hostels are also very good. Every single hostel has 2 rooms and AC as well. Classrooms are good, Wi-Fi is good, and I love the library.

reviews.review_heading: Jaypee could be a better option than other private colleges.
reviews.review_text: There are clean classrooms, well-equipped labs, huge library, overall campus Wi-Fi and hostel Wi-Fi (with limit), medical facility, psychological counselling, cafe, and huge common mess. The college lacks in sports facilities, but as a technology college I will say that it is fine.

reviews.review_heading: Jaypee Noida review by CSE under graduate.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure here is very good. All the classrooms, labs, washrooms, and canteen are available. Every place is very clean and hygienic. You will not face any difficulties with cleanliness and hygiene. The whole campus is Wi-Fi enabled. The labs have the latest technology.

reviews.review_heading: A very good college in terms of private colleges.
reviews.review_text: The mess food is average and hygienic but repetitive, and many students prefer outside food or canteen options. Overall, JIIT is a good option for serious CSE students but less ideal for other branches or those seeking a relaxed college experience. It's okay.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements but boring college life.
reviews.review_text: Medical facilities are good, and the mess is better compared to most colleges. The cafe is nice at first, but you get bored easily because it doesn't offer many good options. The classrooms and the library are also really nice. The Wi-Fi restricts apps like WhatsApp and Amazon. The network in hostels is very limited. First-year hostels are nice, but from the second year onwards, the quality starts to degrade little by little. Wi-Fi connectivity isn't very nice. It can be very frustrating, especi...

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the college, except for the campus area, which is hardly 16 acres.
reviews.review_text: Our course includes all the subjects required. But there are some subjects that lack practical knowledge, just like the other colleges. Hostels here have common washrooms. Rooms contain 2 beds and 2 almirahs. But the most important thing is the friends you make. Talking about sports, there aren't many facilities; no cricket or football ground, while you have a GYM along with a badminton court and a separate Squash Room. Table tennis is present inside the Hostel.

reviews.review_heading: I'm not satisfied with the mess food at all; it's horrible.
reviews.review_text: The college has well-equipped labs, air-conditioned classrooms, good Wi-Fi in academic areas, and a central library with a large collection of books and e-resources. The hostel rooms are clean and maintained regularly, with 24/7 water and electricity backup. The mess food is average, better than some other hostels, but repetitive sometimes. There are multiple canteens and food stalls inside the campus offering a decent variety.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with best experience.
reviews.review_text: The building is great with a very nice and comfortable infrastructure. Free Wi-Fi is there on whole campus, labs are equipped with all the necessary materials that too in a sufficient amount to meet all students' needs, and classrooms have centralized AC and also projectors which almost every teacher uses to teach. Library is the best with no noise and a great amount of books. The food in the cafeteria is so nice with 100% hygiene.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Jaypee 128 sector.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi and labs are satisfactory while classrooms are average. The library is good. Hostels are nice but the mess food is bland. Sports facilities exist but are poorly maintained. Medical assistance is available and efficient. Classrooms could use some renovation. The college infrastructure isn't exceptional; it's a single building college. The surrounding area needs improvement.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements but bad college life.
reviews.review_text: I am in the 128 sector branch where the infra is very below par. There was some construction going on, and also the size of the cafe was so small that it became congested during heavy hours. On top of that, MPH, the multipurpose hall is always occupied with some cultural activities, so there is no place to hang out in the college

reviews.review_heading: Review of students' perspectives.
reviews.review_text: All classrooms are fully air-conditioned, and labs have all the necessary equipment. The quality of the food is good. Sports facilities are limited and have a small ground. There is one MPH in my college where the college conducts all events.

paragraphs: Yes, there is scholarships for BTech students at JIIT Noida. The scholarships are offered by Government scholarships bodies such as Jaiprakash Sewa Sansthan. The Jaiprakash Sewa Sansthan has established an initial corpus of INR 20 Lacs for the William Webster Merit-Cum-Means Scholarship, which will be awarded to eligible students from the income generated through interest from this corpus.

There are various additional costs that students will have to pay in addition to the total tuition fee. This includes hostel charges which are INR 1 Lacs per semester (Gen) and USD 1500 (NRI/Foreign). Students will have to pay INR 20,000 for all programmes (one-time refundable after completion of the programme).
The latest cutoff information for admission to B.Tech at Jaypee Institute of Information Technology scholarships are:
Scholarship Scheme of U.P. Government for economically weak students belonging to state of Uttar Pradesh
William Webster Merit-Cum-Means Scholarship

college_info.intro:
The Hindustan Institute of Technology and Science Chennai is known for its range of courses in the Engineering, Management, Humanities and Arts, Law, etc. streams. Among these courses the BTech and MBA at HIT Chennai stand out as the flagship programmes of the university.
These courses are highly sought-after among students for their placements and career opportunities with HITS BTech graduates able to take on a range of technical roles, all the while BTech students can also choose from among a range of specialisations including CSE, ECE, Mechanical Engineering, Aeronautical Engineering, Civil Engineering, etc.
While students of the HITS MBA programme are trained for less technical roles with an emphasis on Management and Leadership positions. Graduates will find a skill-set and foundation tailor made for the industry and job market with the university having a strong placement rate of 93.94% during recent years.
Further, the university offers these programmes for a duration of 4 and 2 years, respectively with a comprehensive curriculum. HITS Chennai courses strive to enhance the learning experience of students to prepare them for the industry. Candidates can check the popular programmes offered at Hindustan Institute of Technology & Science Chennai Tamil Nadu in the table provided below:

admission_process.title: Hindustan Institute of Technology and Science Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: HITS admission is mainly based on the university’s in-house entrance exam, i.e., HITSEEE & HITSCAT.Hindustan Universityconducts HITSEEE to provide admission to BTech courses. HITSCAT is the new entrance test conducted by the institute for admission to BDes, Law, Management, and some other courses. Additionally, some national entrance exams are also accepted for admission. These include UGC NET, CLAT, and GATE. Apart from this, the university also has a Centre for Open and Digital Education where six courses are taught online including both UG and PG level courses. Hindustan University courses offered include UG, PG, Doctoral, and Integrated courses in popular streams. These are BCom, BBA, BCA, MA, MBA, and MCA.

The institute offers more than 11 courses across various specialisations and aspirants need to apply for courses through the official website. Candidates can read the table below to learn more on Hindustan Institute of Technology and Science admission highlights 2025:
Particulars
HITS Admission Highlights 2025
Mode of study
Programmes offered
11 courses across various specialisations
How to apply?
https://hindustanuniv.ac.in/
Application Status
Level of programmes offered

HITS offers a diverse range of undergraduate, postgraduate, doctoral, and integrated programs in popular fields. Thes include courses from Science, Engineering, Management, Humanities, and Medicine. The following table mentions the eligibility and selection for some of the popularHindustan Institute of Technology and Science courses:
Class 12 with a minimum 50% aggregate
Class 12 with a minimum 50% aggregate
Class 12 with a minimum 50% aggregate
Graduation in any discipline with a minimum 50% aggregate
Graduation in any discipline with a minimum 50% aggregate
Class 12 with a minimum 50% aggregate

Hindustan Institute of Technology and Science (HITS) has a multi-step admission process that students need to follow to get into the university. Starting with the application, students are required to go through the entrance exam followed by selection rounds and lastly confirmation of admission. After the selection rounds are over, course-wise merit lists are released on the official website of the university. Interested candidates can submit the fee and confirm their admission. Additionally, Admission to all the programmes is based on the entrance exam. Check below the complete HITS admission process:
1 - HITS Application 2025
The mode of application is online. Candidates must register online and then fill out the online application form.
2 - HITS Admission Selection rounds
Appear for the university-based entrance exam i.e., HITSEEE & HITSCAT. The selection will be based on entrance exam score and GDPI and then wait for the release of their merit list.
3 - HITS Document Verification
Once the selection rounds are done, the shortlisted candidates are called for document verification. Aspirants need to pay a course fee to confirm their seat in the university.

Apart from that, students can also get admission to various national level entrance exams such as CLAT/ GATE/ UGC NET, for specific courses.To find course-wise details for the accepted entrance exam, click here.

faqs.question: How can I join Hindustan Institute of Technology?
faqs.answer: Hindustan Institute of Technology and Science (HITS) has a multi-step admission process which students need to follow to get into the university. Starting with the application, students are required to go through the entrance exam followed by selection rounds and lastly confirmation of admission. After the selection rounds are over, course-wise merit lists are released on the official website of the university. Interested candidates can submit the fee and confirm their admission. Additionally, Admission to all the programmes is based on the entrance exam. Candidates must check the eligibility criteria on the official website of Hindustan Institute of Technology and Science, before filling out the admission form.

faqs.question: How do I get a seat at Hindustan Institute of Technology and Science?
faqs.answer: Hindustan Institute of Technology and Science offers a large diversity of courses to students in various fields. Hindustan Institute of Technology and Science admissions are held on the basis of both merit and entrance tests. Students seeking course admissions must clear their previous qualifying examination and appear for any of the prescribed entrance exams such as HITSEEE, HITSCAT, NATA, among others. Students can visit the official website to learn more regarding the course-wise eligibility and specialisation details.

faqs.question: What is the average package offered at Hindustan University placements?
faqs.answer: The Hindustan University average package offered to BTech and BArch students during Hindustan University placements 2024 stood at INR 4.60 LPA and INR 4.50 LPA, respectively. The following table showcases the Hindustan University packages offered in 2024 placement drive: Course Average Package (2024) BTech INR 4.6 LPA MTech INR 4.5 LPA MBA INR 4.5 LPA BArch INR 4.5 LPA Note: The above-mentioned packages are taken from the official website. These are assumed as average packages as only salary was mentioned on the official website.

faqs.question: What is the fee structure for MBA at HITS Chennai?
faqs.answer: The total fee for HITS Chennai MBA courses is cumulative of multiple components, such as security deposit, tuition fee, hostel fee, and more. Selected candidates have to pay admission fee amount after selection for seat confirmation. Hindustan Institute of Technology and Science MBA tuition fee range from INR 1.2 Lacs to INR 4.3 lakh . Additionally, the one-time fee is INR 8,500 and the hostel charges range from INR 1.48 Lacs to INR 1.64 lakh . It must be noted that the mentioned fee is as per the official website/sanctioning body. It is still subject to changes and hence, is indicative.

faqs.question: What is the fee for LLB at Hindustan University?
faqs.answer: The total tuition fee for LLB courses at Hindustan University is INR 5 lakh. Candidates also have to pay tutition fee and hostel fee. Note: This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

hostel.description:
The hostels have well-furnished air-conditioned and regular rooms with attached restrooms providing the right ambience for the students. There are five residential halls for boys and three for girls on campus
that accommodate over 2500 students. State of the art kitchen and spacious dining area has been provided for both the hostels and a customized menu caters to the student’s needs. Hygiene and cleanliness is emphasized in the hostel. All the hostels offer a variety of services and opportunities for students. Staff members residing in the hostel are assigned to address academic and personal problems of the students. Round-the-clock security, communication, dispensary facilities are also available.

library.description: The HITS' Library has a collection of 105253 books, 42262 online journals and 389 printed journals, 12 newspaper, 64 thesis and dissertations, 3031 project reports and 2792 CDs. The Library system consists of a Central Library and Departmental Libraries which collectively support the teaching, research and extension programmes of the Institute. All students, faculty members and employees of the Institute are entitled to use the Library facilities enrolling membership.

reviews.review_heading: MBA in Business Analytics.
reviews.review_text: A lot of controversies happened in the college, especially during the inter college cultural which severely disrupted the pace of the whole college. Providing permission for conducting such events often in the college causes the students to lower their concentration on academics and placement wise. Apart from all the beautiful campus it looks like the best facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the campus infrastructure, and they conduct many events.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of Hindustan Institute of Technology and Science is awesome and full of greenish environment. It gives a peaceful mind for the students to concentrate on their studies. Labs with well quality equipments, and they give importance to studies as well as sports.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Hindustan Institute of Technology and Science.
reviews.review_text: College should always be proud of their student's achievements. College is so good by the means of transportation facilities. They also collect very minimal charges for every student for transportation. Apart from grading systems, college looks for well-disciplined students.

reviews.review_heading: A detailed insight of my college placements, infrastructure, teachers, curriculum, and campus life.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is decent and green. The drainage systems are well maintained, and in rainy seasons there won't be much clogged water. There are different architectural buildings for different departments. Library is well-maintained and air-conditioned. There are football field, basketball court, badminton court, etc. There are 2 canteens and a mini super-market is also there.

reviews.review_heading: Detailed insights into my college placements, infrastructure, faculty, curriculum, and campus life.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is decent and green. The drainage systems are well maintained, and in rainy seasons there won't be much clogged water. There are different architectural buildings for different departments. The library is well-maintained and air-conditioned. There are football field, basketball court, badminton court, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied by the college and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Labs and classrooms are clean and hygienic and have all the equipment required for the particular course. When it comes to me, I study computer Science (AI&this), labs are very good, with good signal strength, and proper systems for coding. Being a day scholar I'm unaware of the hostel but my friends living in hostel tells that the rooms are great, good needs to be improved.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with college.
reviews.review_text: The food is good in the hostel and also there are clinic in our college for medical emergencies.

reviews.review_heading: The start of my twenties in the best place HITS.
reviews.review_text: HITS has good infrastructure where it is peaceful and quiet in common with more trees. Also, the hostels are well-equipped with basic need amenities. The quality of the food is also very hygienic and clean. At last, the best part is the library which is very large and peaceful to our work.

reviews.review_heading: Need improvements in placements, classrooms, and upgradation in syllabus.
reviews.review_text:
Library is so good and classroom's AC won't work. No Wi-Fi is available.
The quality of the food is so good and they are well-focused on sports and events and if you like extra activities you can choose this college it well suits you but for knowledge, it's not the right one for the future.

reviews.review_heading: A proper college to gain knowledge in aeronautics and aerospace for a career.
reviews.review_text: The college has good architecture and infrastructure design. Students have various hangout spots to relax. The college has good hostel facilities, including AC and non-AC, providing hygienic food for North Indian and South Indian students. Good medical facilities are also provided in the college.

reviews.review_heading: Life at HITS - Can survive and excel when you have an interest to be motivated and ask doubts.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms and labs are okay in Hindustan. Library is very good and well-maintained. It has 5 floors and air-conditioned. I didn't opt for hostel but still some of my friends said it was average. There is 1 main canteen and some small snacks and ice-cream shops are available.

reviews.review_heading: Life in Hindustan, everything u need to know from an hindustaninan.
reviews.review_text: So facilities are good in Hindustan like we have so many labs like aerodynamics lab, propulsion system lab and computer labs and only hostellers are provided with Wi-Fi and in hostels even though the fee is a bit high it is good and the food is good too .

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the curriculum but need more placements in relevant fields.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure and facilities were good. It contained aircraft hanger, fight simulator, chetak helicopter, learjet aircraft, wind tunnels, etc. Different varieties of hostels were provided based on our requirements and comfort. Sports and games were available too. We could go for horse riding as well.

reviews.review_heading: I am a little dissatisfied because of placement and, moreover, good infrastructure and faculties.
reviews.review_text: Good infrastructure and peaceful environment. Students are friendly, and good laboratory facilities are available. Many play areas are available for students. They give space for sports too. Good and neat environment. Good food and hostel feel good because of caring and cleanliness.

reviews.review_heading: Overall it is a good campus and worth the money.
reviews.review_text: Hindustan Institute of Technology and Science (HITS) provides excellent infrastructure with Wi-Fi, smart classrooms, well-equipped labs, and a comprehensive library. Hostels offer modern amenities and 24/7 medical services. The campus has a hygienic mess, a canteen, and sports facilities for various outdoor and indoor games.

paragraphs: Hindustan Institute of Technology and Science offers both need-based and merit-based scholarships to the eligible students. Also, Hindustan Institute of Technology and Science has instituted Hindustan Teaching Research Fellowships (HTRF) for eligible candidates.
Below are the major highlights of Hindustan Institute of Technology and Science scholarships:

Hindustan Institute of Technology and Science provides a total of 7 scholarships to eligible students. Below mentioned are the detailed information regarding Hindustan Institute of Technology and Science scholarships:
DRDO Scholarship Scheme for Girls

This scholarship is for Girls / Women students studying in first year of Under Graduate (BE/B.TECH: full time four year degree) and Post Graduate (M.TECH/ME: two year full time degree course) under “DRDO Scholarship Scheme for Girls in Aerospace Engg / Aeronautical Engg / Space Engg & Rocketry / Avionics / Aircraft Engg”.
Covid Martyrs Scholarships

This scholarship is for wards of COVID Martyrs, who have lost their lives protecting our countrymen during the COVID Pandemic will be given complete Tuition Fee waiver in the discipline of their choice, having met the basic laid down norms, such as marks in qualifying exams etc. Also all the expenses of the student which include traveling, boarding and lodging will be taken care of by HITS. Also, a monthly stipend is provided during the period of the course.
Covid Frontline Warrior Scholarship

This scholarship is for the wards of Doctors, Healthcare professionals, Government and Service personnel those who have participated in protecting our countrymen during the COVID Pandemic. The scholarship is for a period of two years across all courses to those who meet the basic scholarship criteria.
Dr KCG Verghese Merit Cum Means Scholarship

This scholarship is offered to the top scorers in Class 12 from any School, Boards, Subjects, Centum Scorers, Class Toppers at HITS, Batch Toppers, and UG Rank Holders and Proficiency Prize holders are awarded scholarship to pursue their higher studies at HITS. Scholarships are also awarded to the meritorious students who are financially weak to meet their educational needs at HITS.
Dr Elizabeth Verghese Founder Chancellor Scholarship

This scholarship is offered to the girls with academic potential to pursue higher education and who are from lower income families and are interested in pursuing higher education at HITS are eligible for this scholarship.
Hindusthan Loyality Scholarship
This scholarship is subject to norms and the scrutiny of the Scholarship Committee. It is offered to:
Sports Scholarship

Hindustan Institute of Technology and Science offers this scholarship to the students who excel in sports. The student who has performed and achieved at the National, State and Inter-University Levels in the following sports are eligible.

individual_reviews.title: Good college, with great atmosphere.

content.Placements: The tentative percentage of students placed every year from our campus is almost hundred percent. Many great companies visit our campus during the placement session like Amazon, Flipkart, Google, Walmart, Cisco, Adobe, etc. The internship percentage of the students is also very great; almost all the students get internship during the third or fourth year. Many students even get internship during the second year. This year only almost five to six students get selected in Google code.
