overview_faqs.answer: For the MBA course, the total course fee at JNTUH ranges between INR 54,000 and INR 3 Lacs. For B.Tech and M.Tech courses, the course fee ranges between INR 30,000 and INR 4.15 Lacs and INR 56,000 - INR 2.28 Lacs, respectively. Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University (JNTU), Kakinada offers undergraduate, postgraduate, and doctoral-level programmes for students such as B.Tech, B.Pharma B.Arch Pharma. D M.Tech, M.Pharma MCA MBA, MAM, and Ph.D. under various disciplines. The admissions are based on national-level entrance tests or merit basis.

overview_faqs.question: Is JNTU Kakinada good for MBA?
overview_faqs.answer: Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University (JNTU), Kakinada offers two years MBA course offered in a ful-time mode. The programme costs between INR 54,000 and INR 3 lakh. The placements at JNTU Kakinada for MBA programme are decnt. The average salary package offered during JNTU Kakinada MBA placements 2022 stood at INR 5.02 LPA. Further, the university also been accredited by NAAC with a Grade of 'A+' and approved by AICTE & UGC. JNTU Kakinada has received 151 Rank in the Overall Category by the National Institutional Ranking Framework (NIRF) 2023. Overall JNTUK is a good university for candidates wants to pursue MBA in a low cost.

review_summary.college_name: JNTUK Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: You get placements if you are a topper.

content.Placements: We have many companies collaborating with our college like IBM and KMPH. We get many companies and MNCs, multinational companies like Saint Goblin and many others. We also have internships with normal funds provided. As per me, I participate in many hackathons conducted by our college.
content.Infrastructure: We have nice infrastructure and clean roads with nice greenery. We also have large grounds with indoor and outdoor basketball courts. There is a bus facility. Our college is around 300 acres approximately. We also have 2 main libraries and many small libraries, also with chemical and mechanical labs.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech in Automobile Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Okay, it is good and not too bad.

content.Placements: 35 percent of students are placed in my course and the highest package is 6 LPA and the lowest package will be 1.5 LPA. Average package will be 2 LPA to 3 LPA are offered in my course and the top recruiting companies are Tesla, Google, Microsoft, VVDN. 30 percent of students got internship from my course in Tesla and VVDN companies and the top roles will be HR manager only.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure are good and there is no Wi-Fi in college. Classrooms are clean and good and the library is covered with AC, it is good, and stock is updated daily, it is very good. The facilities in hostel are not good because it is not clean, and food also not tasty in mess, but canteen food is good and sports and games are very good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Genuine review of GIET college.

content.Placements: My batch is from 2021 to 2025. Overall, classes were going well, but placements were low when compared to other universities. Academics were good, but the fee was very high, and the security of the college was very strict. The lowest package was 3 LPA, and the highest was 6 LPA, even though skilled persons remain jobless.
content.Infrastructure: Cultural activities were good in the college. When it comes to the hostel, the food was average, and the infrastructure was good. The classrooms, library, and canteen were very near the blocks and good. They allow sports in cultural activities only, but not for the leisure period in college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Pros and cons of Gayatri Vidya Parishad College of Engineering by me.

content.Placements: In GVPCE, nearly 60-70% of students are placed in our course, and the higher package in mechanical engineering is around 12 LPA, the average is 4-6 LPA, and the lowest is 3.6 LPA. The top recruitment companies are Infosys, Wipro, Cognizant, etc. The top roles offered are product manager, design engineer, and nearly 80% of students get internship offers from companies likes Renolt, Hyundai, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure in our college are good enough, and the labs and classrooms are well-maintained. The hostel food facilities are okay for minimal prices, and they provide good medical facilities and encourage students for sports and games in our mechanical department. A madam named keerthi, she teaches us the C language and the mechanical subject. She is very supportive of students by guiding them.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: The problems and facilities in Gayatri Vidya Parishad College of Engineering.

content.Placements: 60% of students were placed in our course. 10 LPA is the highest, 1 LPA is the lowest, and 5 LPA is the average package offered in our course. TCS, Wipro, and Cognizant are the top recruiting companies for our course. 30% of students got internships from our course in Renault, Hyundai, TCS, and Wipro companies. System engineering, AutoCAD designer, and technology analyst are the roles offered in our course.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is good enough, but facilities are a little low. The quality of the facilities in our hostel is good, the quality of food available in the mess and canteen is good with minimal prices, and the quantity of food is also good. Sports and games are also given priority. Separate hours will be provided for that, tournaments will also be conducted, and students are also interested in participating.

paragraphs: JNTUK application process involves shortlisting of students, the release of merit list, counselling, and seat allotment. Find out more on JNTUK admission below:1 - Application ProcessJNTUH admissions require students to visit the official website of the respective national-level entrance exam conducting bodies. They need to fill out the application form in online mode.
For the remaining programme candidates are required to apply directly from the official website of JNTUK.
2 - Shortlisting of Students & Release of Merit List

JNTUK shortlists candidates based on entrance exam performance. These include TS EAMCET, GATE, GPAT, etc. The state-level exam conducting bodies, such as TS ICET, release course-wise merit lists for MBA and MCA courses. The university releases a merit list for courses based on merit or national-level exams.
3 - Counselling

Once the merit list is released, eligible students are invited for counselling rounds. For MBA and MCA courses, the counselling is conducted by the TS ICET Counseling. For BTech admission, the TS EAMCET Counseling is held. And for MTech PGECET counseling is required.
4 - Seat Allotment & Admission Confirmation
As per the round of counselling, seats are allotted to the eligible students. Further, the selected students can confirm their admission by paying the course fees.

JNTUK fee is broken down into multiple components, such as tuition fee, hostel fee, and one-time fee. The components in the total fee vary with the course selected by the students. However, the overall tuition fee for JNTUK ranges between INR 25 Kand INR 10 L. Find below JNTUK fees for top courses:

TNTUK offers a limited number of seats for its UG and PG programmes. Programme seats are also offered vis the university's affiliated colleges/campuses. Canddiates must pay the admission fee to finalise the course seats at JNTUK:
lists: BTech/ BPharm aspiring candidates can apply for the programme on the official website ofTS EAMCET.
For the MTech/ MSc programme, the candidates are required to register on the official website ofTS PGECET.
For the MBA program, candidates must register on the official website ofAP ICETorTSCIET.

faqs.question: What is the admission criteria for JNTUK?
faqs.answer: Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University (JNTU), Kakinada offers five courses at the undergraduate level, namely B.Tech, B.Pharma B.Arch Pharma. D and integrated MBA. The duration of B.Tech and B.Pharma is four years each, whereas B.Arch and integrated MBA are of five-year duration. Pharma. D is of six-year duration. Admission to all these courses is entrance exam-based. For JNTUK Ph.D. admission, candidates must appear in one of the entrance exams such as UGC NET/ CSIR NET/ GATE/ Andhra Pradesh RCET followed by Interview.

placement_data.title: JNTUK Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: The highest package offered JNTUK placements 2024 till now stood at INR 35 LPA. This package was offered to two students of ECE and CSE branch . Further, the second highest package offered stood at INR 16.3 LPA . The highest and second highest package was offered by Commvault and Darwain Box , respectively.

Further, as per the Engineering NIRF report 2024 released by Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University, Kakinada, the median package offered to BTech batch 2023 was INR 4.7 LPA . Further, a total of 314 BTech students were placed in 2023.

JNTUK AP EAMCET Cutoff 2025 has been published for all rounds and categories under both the All India and Home State quota. For the General category candidates belonging to the All India quota, the cutoff range in the last round was 485 to 22520, wherein B.E. / B.Tech was the hardest course to get admission to for this category.

JNTUK B.E. / B.Tech cutoff 2025, along with the cutoffs for 2024 and 2023 for various categories and rounds, can be found in this section. As per the last round of AP EAMCET, the hardest course for admission was B.E. / B.Tech for the General AI category, which had the cutoff of 485.
Students can see the table below to know the cutoff for other categories and quotas.

Students who want admission to Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University, Kakinada for courses offered via AP EAMCET examination can see the table below to know the important dates for enrolment. Candidates can also download these essential dates as a PDF file for later use.

The Andhra Pradesh State Council of Higher Education (APSCHE) conducts the AP EAMCET exam for admission to BTech, BPharm, and BSc in Agriculture, Bachelor's in Fisheries, and Bachelor's in Horticulture programmes. Students can refer to the table below to either view or download the round-wise cutoff for 2025, 2024, and 2023.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by GIET Engineering CollegeReviewed on 22 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: You get placements if you are a topper.
reviews.review_text: We have nice infrastructure and clean roads with nice greenery. We also have large grounds with indoor and outdoor basketball courts. There is a bus facility. Our college is around 300 acres approximately. We also have 2 main libraries and many small libraries, also with chemical and mechanical labs.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by GIET Engineering CollegeReviewed on 22 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Okay, it is good and not too bad.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure are good and there is no Wi-Fi in college. Classrooms are clean and good and the library is covered with AC, it is good, and stock is updated daily, it is very good. The facilities in hostel are not good because it is not clean, and food also not tasty in mess, but canteen food is good and sports and games are very good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Godavari Institute of Engineering and TechnologyReviewed on 22 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Genuine review of GIET college.
reviews.review_text: Cultural activities were good in the college. When it comes to the hostel, the food was average, and the infrastructure was good. The classrooms, library, and canteen were very near the blocks and good. They allow sports in cultural activities only, but not for the leisure period in college.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Gayatri Vidya Parishad College of EngineeringReviewed on 22 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Pros and cons of Gayatri Vidya Parishad College of Engineering by me.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure in our college are good enough, and the labs and classrooms are well-maintained. The hostel food facilities are okay for minimal prices, and they provide good medical facilities and encourage students for sports and games in our mechanical department. A madam named keerthi, she teaches us the C language and the mechanical subject. She is very supportive of students by guiding them.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Gayatri Vidya Parishad College of EngineeringReviewed on 22 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: The problems and facilities in Gayatri Vidya Parishad College of Engineering.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good enough, but facilities are a little low. The quality of the facilities in our hostel is good, the quality of food available in the mess and canteen is good with minimal prices, and the quantity of food is also good. Sports and games are also given priority. Separate hours will be provided for that, tournaments will also be conducted, and students are also interested in participating.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Sasi Institute of Technology and EngineeringReviewed on 21 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: The college is nice but average placements, good infrastructure, but no fests.
reviews.review_text: The college has Wi-Fi and labs. The classroom was nice, the hostel was also nice, but the food was average, and the quality was also average. The medical facility is also nice, sports and games are also nice, but need to be improved. NCC and NSS were excellent, but activities were fewer when compared to other colleges. Finally, the college was nice.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Dr. K.V. Subba Reddy Institute of Technology (KVSRIT)
reviews.review_heading: Good faculty with their friendly nature, but we weren't satisfied with placements.
reviews.review_text: Our college infrastructure is good, but not excellent. The lab and library facilities are also available. Our faculty can support us in explaining content coming to the hostel, it is best, but we need to adjust with dinner, and apart from that, everything is good maintenance.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Gayatri Vidya Parishad College of EngineeringReviewed on 21 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: The opportunities provided by Gayatri Vidya Parishad College of Engineering.
reviews.review_text: The facilities in Gayatri Vidya Parishad College of Engineering are one of the best things. The labs in our college are well maintained with the best machines and equipment. The college has Wi-Fi availability, classrooms are well maintained, and each class has a separate projector. The infrastructure of GVPCE is quite better compared with other colleges. They provide quality food in the college canteen and hostel mess. We can get unlimited food at the college hostel for only 50 rupees per plate....

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Raghu Engineering CollegeReviewed on 21 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Good along with learning environment and average package.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are very good with pure drinking water and cleaned washrooms, along with AC, central library, and classrooms cleaned every day. Wi-Fi is available everywhere in the college for free, and lab equipment is there. The hostel is very clean, but the problem is high fees for hostel stay. Food is very tasty, and every day in the evening and morning sports and games are conducted.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Sagi Rama Krishnam Raju Engineering CollegeReviewed on 21 Jan 2026)

There is a central library at the starting point of the college, and there are department libraries in each department building. College faculty and management are very supportive towards sports and games, yoga s...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Shri Vishnu Engineering College for WomenReviewed on 21 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Good college if you can use the resources well and are dedicated.
reviews.review_text: The labs, classrooms, and library are excellent and top-rated. They give first priority to hygiene. Every part of the campus is very neat and clean. The hostel rooms are also very neat; they clean them regularly and maintain proper hygiene. Medical facilities are also available all the time. Separate facilities for games like carrom, basketball, and cricket are also provided within the campus.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Aditya UniversityReviewed on 20 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: It's absolutely a perfect place filled with different religions and different countries.
reviews.review_text: Hostels are hygienic, and the food is also good. They maintain the hostel room good and clean everyday. The infrastructure is awesome, all the classrooms are equipped with smartboards and Wi-Fi facility and all the floors have separate restrooms for both genders, and playgrounds are also available.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Aditya UniversityReviewed on 20 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Placements of 2026 for Aditya.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms are very organized and fully equipped with Wi-Fi facilities. The library is fully organized and has fully updated books with Wi-Fi facilities and computers. There is a reference room where we can take our interviews with high-speed Wi-Fi.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Raghu Engineering CollegeReviewed on 20 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Better placements are required.
reviews.review_text: I am a day-scholar, as my friends who were in a college hostel in the 1st year have shared their experience with me, saying that they have 2 outings monthly. Especially the girls should return to the hostel by 9:00 PM, as our college is located on the highway, it is not safe for anyone to roam around, as vehicles pass by day and night. The area is also not so good at night, it is peaceful, but you need to be careful. They provide non-vegetarian food weekly, thrice, and chicken on Sunday. Coming ...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Aditya College of Engineering and TechnologyReviewed on 20 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Best out of all colleges for placements.
reviews.review_text: The college is surrounded by greenery and spacious blocks with well-educated and trained faculty. We have so many labs with an AC facility, and the library is full of updated books and Wi-Fi facilities. In the library, we have reference rooms where we can take interviews, no one can enter the room.

table.details: KPR Institute of Engineering and Technology

college_info.intro: KPR Institute of Engineering and Technology's popular programmes are BTech and MBA. The institute offers a full-time, four-year BTech programme at the UG level. The BTech programmes offered at the university cover core courses in the areas of Biomedical Engineering, Chemical Engineering, Civil Engineering, CSE, Information Technology, Mechanical Engineering, and others. The MBA programme offered by the KPR Institute of Engineering and Technology is a two-year programme. The institute offered an MBA specialisation in General Management. The below-mentioned are the KPR Institute of Engineering and Technology popular programmes:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: KPR Institute of Engineering and Technology offers UG and PG courses across the Engineering and Management stream. At the UG level, the institute offers BTech courses across various specialisations such as Biomedical Engineering, Chemical Engineering, Civil Engineering, CSE, Information Technology, Mechanical Engineering, and others. At the PG level, the institute offers MTech and MBA programmes. The below-mentioned are KPR Institute of Engineering and Technology courses along with the eligibility criteria and KPR Institute of Engineering and Technology fees:

faqs.answer: A:    The application fee for TNEA is INR 500 for the general candidates and INR 250 for SC /SCA /ST category belonging to Tamil Nadu.
faqs.question: What is the TNEA application fee?

faqs.answer: A:    Candidates must complete Class 12 with Physics, Chemistry and Mathematics with at least 45% aggregate (40% aggregate for SC/ SCA/ ST/ MBC & DNC/ Backward Class including Backward Class Muslims) to apply for KPR Institute of Engineering and Technology BE/ BTech course. Candidates must hold the documents proving their eligibility for verification at the time of admission.
faqs.question: What is the eligibility for BTech at KPRIET?

faqs.answer: A:    The fee structure for the B.Tech programme at KPR Institute of Engineering and Technology is as of 2023 may be the  yearly fee for the B.Tech programme is around INR 97k. and The total fee for the entire duration of the programme ranges from INR 50k to INR 2,00,000 per annum and hostel accomedation fees are counted seperately yearly, Do contact the institute as the fee structure may vary.
faqs.question: How much does M.Tech at KPR Institute of Engineering and Technology cost?

faqs.answer: A:    The total tuition fee for the B.E. in Biomedical Engineering course at KPR College is INR 2.00 Lakh. The course is four years long and admits 60 students. Applicants must have at least 45% in 12th to be admitted.

review_summary.college_name: KPR College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E in Computer Science and Engineering (AI and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Excellent for learning if you adjust, though the hostel mess is poor, and some faculty are difficult

content.Placements: For my department, placement is going great so far. Almost 80 percent have got an offer, but can't say for sure about other departments. For my department personnel, HOD is trying really hard for all of us and also for junior but I have seen some department members neglecting their duty as well. So please be careful when choosing.
content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is good, with enough facilities to learn and explore if you have the motivation to use them properly. The campus environment supports growth, but personal effort matters the most. Hostel facilities have improved recently with the construction of a new hostel, making living conditions more comfortable and manageable. The mess, however, is disappointing. There are three food options, the first two, meant for South Indian and international students, are repetitive and lack quality. The third option, intercontinental food, offers a better variety and taste and is clearly the only good choice.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely good faculty, placements, and infrastructure with facilities.

content.Placements: Students in my B.E. Engineering course at KPR Institute of Engineering and Technology get placed. The highest percentage score is above 95%, and the lowest is around 50%. The average percentage is below 50%. Companies like Google hire engineers from here.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi connection is very good in my college, and we have AC labs and high-tech infrastructure. The classrooms are also high-tech, providing a peaceful study. The hostel and food quality are excellent. Medical facilities, sports, and games receive extra care. The mess and canteen are hygienic.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: KPR Institute of Engineering and Technology is the best engineering college.

content.Placements: KPR Institute of Engineering and Technology is good placement records in 2021. More than 95% of students got placed in good companies. This college has more active placement training cell. So they brought more reputed recruiting companies like TCS, Ashok Leyland, Titan, Infosys, IBM, and Accenture for this college campus interviews. The highest salary packages is 14 LPA. The lowest salary packages is 3 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: KPR Institute of Engineering and Technology is one of the best infrastructure college in Coimbatore. This college has good hostel facilities. Hostel foods are very hygienic and healthy. Multiple sports grounds facilities are available in this college. More laboratories and library facilities are available in this college. More comfortable and spacious classrooms are available in this college. Wi-Fi network and CCTV camera facilities are also here this college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech in Chemical Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Review of KPR Institute of Engineering and Technology.

content.Placements: As I am currently a final-year chemical engineering student at KPR Institute of Engineering and Technology, Coimbatore, this college has a good placement record in colleges around Coimbatore. On average, 90% of students in our department get placed in core companies. The average CTC is 4.5 LPA, and the maximum CTC is 8.5 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: This college has good infrastructure and is well-known as a green campus. It also has a good Wi-Fi facility overall on the campus. Every department has its own library, other than that of the central library. The campus is very neat and clean in it.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: KPR is the best choice. All facilities that you need to outshine as an engineer are a single roof.

content.Placements: They start making you industry-ready from the 3rd year itself, with excellent placement training from internal and external placement guides and experts. The highest package received in my batch is 40 LPA, and students get internship offers from many prestigious organizations.
content.Infrastructure: Upgraded labs. All kinds of facilities in a single place. Hostels are very good, surrounded by the natural environment that makes it more admirable and feels like home. The hostel provides full safety and support.
content.Faculty: Teachers here are easy to approach, and they are always ready to support and help students in all aspects. They follow a mentor-mentee system through which every student in a class gets full support from the faculty members. In every semester, there are two continuous internal assessments followed by end-semester exams. Industry-driven curriculum, training in new technologies.

admission_overview.college_name: KPR College Admission 2025: Eligibility, Fee, Application & Selection

paragraphs: KPRIET admissionsare both merit and entrance-based. The institute considers scores in TANCET, CEETA PG or GATE for admission to specific PG courses. For BE/ BTech programmes, aspirants are selected based on Class 12 score followed by TNEA Counselling.KPRIEToffers courses at UG and PG levels in Engineering and Management streams. The institute offers courses in affiliation withAnna University. Interested candidates can apply online for admission.

KPRIET offers admission to UG courses based on merit whereas, entrance exam scores are considered for PG programmes. The institute considers TANCET, CEETA PG and GATE scores for admission to PG programmes. Below areKPRIET coursesalong with their eligibility and selection criteria:
KPRIET admissions are currently open. Candidates are offered seats in the institute based on their entrance or qualifying exam score. Below is the KPRIET admission process in detail:
Step 1: KPRIET Application Process 2025

Candidates with a Class 12 score need to apply for TNEA Counselling for BE/ BTech programmes. For all other courses, aspirants need to fill out the enquiry form available on the institute's website. Aspirants before applying must first register for the accepted entrance exam.
Step 2: Selection
KPRIET selects candidates for BE/ BTech programmes based on Class 12 scores. The institute accepts TANCET and GATE/ CEETA PG for MBA and ME programmes, respectively.
Step 3: Counselling & Seat Allotment

Candidates seeking admission in BE/ BTech courses are offered seats via TNEA Counselling. For all other programmes, candidates need to provide their entrance exam scores and report at the campus for document verification. Selected aspirants need to pay theKPRIET feeto confirm their seat in the institute.

courses_data.description: KPR Institute of Engineering and Technology offers a four-year full-time BE/ BTech course divided into eight semesters. The institute offers BE inCivil, Mechanical, Electrical & Electronics Engineering, etc. BTech programme is available in Chemical Engineering,Artificial Intelligence & Data Science, Information Technology, etc. Candidates who have completed Class 12 with Physics, Chemistry and Mathematics are eligible to apply for BE/ BTech programme. The institute also offers lateral entry to BE/ BTech course.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility for BTech at KPRIET?
faqs.answer: Candidates must complete Class 12 with Physics, Chemistry and Mathematics with at least 45% aggregate (40% aggregate for SC/ SCA/ ST/ MBC & DNC/ Backward Class including Backward Class Muslims) to apply for KPR Institute of Engineering and Technology BE/ BTech course. Candidates must hold the documents proving their eligibility for verification at the time of admission.

faqs.question: Does KPRIET offer lateral entry in BTech course?
faqs.answer: Yes, KPR Institute of Engineering and Technology offers lateral entry to BTech course. Aspirants must pass Diploma examination with at least 45% aggregate (40% aggregate for candidates belonging to reserved category) in any branch of Engineering and Technology to apply for KPRIET BTech (lateral entry) course.

faqs.question: How much does B.Tech Biomedical Engineering at KPR Institute of Engineering and Technology cost?
faqs.answer: The total tuition fee for the B.E. in Biomedical Engineering course at KPR College isINR 2.00 Lakh. The course is four years long and admits 60 students. Applicants must have at least 45% in 12th to be admitted.

courses_data.description: KPRIET offers a two-year full-time MBA programme divided into four semesters through KPR Business School. The course is offered at the PG level. Admission to the MBA is based on TANCET score. Besides, candidates must also complete their graduation in any discipline to apply for MBA.

faqs.question: Is MBA available at KPRIET?
faqs.answer: Yes, KPR Institute of Engineering and Technology offers a two-year full-time MBA programme spread across four semesters through KPR Business School. The course is offered at the PG level. The selection to the MBA is based on TANCET score.

faqs.question: Is TANCET accepted for MBA at KPRIET?
faqs.answer: Yes, KPR Institute of Engineering and Technology considers TANCET scores for MBA admission. Tamil Nadu Common Entrance Test or TANCET, is an admission test conducted in offline mode. Anna University conducts the state-level entrance once in a year. Candidates are offered seat in KPRIET based on their TANCET rank.

faqs.question: How much is the intake across all courses being offerred at KPR Institute of Engineering and Technology?

faqs.question: What is the last date to apply for KPR Institute of Engineering and Technology admission?
faqs.answer: The last date to apply for the KPRIET is different for TNEA and for management quota admission. Generally, the TNEA counseling admissions get completed in September itself but the admission through management quota is generally done on first come first served basis and such quota admissions can go on till the intake is complete. faqs.question: Are admissions open at KPRIET?
faqs.answer: KPR Institute of Engineering and Technology admissions are currently open. Candidates need to register for TNEA for BE/ BTech admission. For PG, aspirants must first apply for accepted entrance exam and then at the official website of the institute for admission. Admission to KPRIET courses is both merit and entrance-based.

faqs.question: Can I get admission at KPRIET without appearing in any entrance exam?
faqs.answer: The answer to this question depends on the course applied by the candidate. KPR Institute of Engineering and Technology offers admission to UG courses based on Class 12 score of the candidates. Hence, aspirants applying for BE/ BTech does not require qualifying any entrance exam. For all other courses, entrance exam is required for admission.

faqs.question: How can I get admission at KPRIET?
faqs.answer: KPR Institute of Technology admissions are both merit and entrance-based. The institute selects candidates for BE/ BTech programmes based on Class 12 scores. The institute accepts TANCET and GATE/ CEETA PG for MBA and ME programmes, respectively. After completion of the selection process, aspirants need to participate in counselling and document verification round.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission at KPRIET?
faqs.answer: KPR Institute of Engineering and Technology does not offer direct admission. Candidates shortlists candidates for UG courses i.e. BE/ BTech based on Class 12 score followed by TNEA Counselling. Besides, admission to MBA and ME courses is based on TANCET and GATE/ CEETA PG, respectively. Once selected, aspirants need to participate in counselling and document verification round.

placement_data.title: KPRIET Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: The 2024 batch comprised 1,002 students. Out of these, 807 students were interested during the 2024 recruitment drives and 743 students were placed . The highest package offered during the KPRIET placements 2024 was INR 54 LPA . The average package stood at INR 5.20 LPA and the median package offered was INR 4 LPA . The overall placement percentage for 2024 was 93% .

The institute has a Placement Cell that organises Career Guidance and Career Support Programs and trains the students on communication skills and personality development. Alongside this, Quantitative Aptitude, Logical Reasoning and Verbal Reasoning through Corporate Trainers, Industry Experts and In-House Trainers were also provided to prepare the students for real-world challenges.

faqs.question: How to prepare for KPR Institute of Engineering and Technology placement drive?
faqs.answer: Most of the companies start the placement process with a pre-placement talk that describes the job profile, the company's vision and the services provided by them. Students are advised to attend the PPT for the desired company as it is the base step of preparation for that particular company. Thereafter, prepare a decent resume highlighting your skills, academic background, and extra-curricular details. The most important step of the placement interview is the test conducted by the interviewer. Students should well prepare the Logical Reasoning, Verbal Ability, and Quantitative Awareness topics. Alongside this, prepare the basics of the core subject, depending upon the branch they are studying in. To excel in the GD round, try to initiate first and listen carefully to the point put forward by the other members.

reviews.review_heading: Excellent for learning if you adjust, though the hostel mess is poor, and some faculty are difficult
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is good, with enough facilities to learn and explore if you have the motivation to use them properly. The campus environment supports growth, but personal effort matters the most. Hostel facilities have improved recently with the construction of a new hostel, making living conditions more comfortable and manageable. The mess, however, is disappointing. There are three food options, the first two, meant for South Indian and international students, are repetitive and lac...

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely good faculty, placements, and infrastructure with facilities.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi connection is very good in my college, and we have AC labs and high-tech infrastructure. The classrooms are also high-tech, providing a peaceful study. The hostel and food quality are excellent. Medical facilities, sports, and games receive extra care. The mess and canteen are hygienic.

reviews.review_heading: KPR Institute of Engineering and Technology is the best engineering college.
reviews.review_text: KPR Institute of Engineering and Technology is one of the best infrastructure college in Coimbatore. This college has good hostel facilities. Hostel foods are very hygienic and healthy. Multiple sports grounds facilities are available in this college. More laboratories and library facilities are available in this college. More comfortable and spacious classrooms are available in this college. Wi-Fi network and CCTV camera facilities are also here this college.

reviews.review_heading: Review of KPR Institute of Engineering and Technology.
reviews.review_text: This college has good infrastructure and is well-known as a green campus. It also has a good Wi-Fi facility overall on the campus. Every department has its own library, other than that of the central library. The campus is very neat and clean in it.

reviews.review_heading: KPR is the best choice. All facilities that you need to outshine as an engineer are a single roof.
reviews.review_text: Upgraded labs. All kinds of facilities in a single place. Hostels are very good, surrounded by the natural environment that makes it more admirable and feels like home. The hostel provides full safety and support.

reviews.review_heading: Review about KPRIET, Coimbatore.
reviews.review_text: Facilities of the college are very good, and the infrastructure is very good in the college. The environment for learning is very good, and student engagement in many activities other than studies is also encouraged. Additionally, the hostel is very protective and safe for students.

reviews.review_heading: KPR - Top placements and growth.
reviews.review_text: Many facilities like Wi-Fi 24/7 are there. Many labs are available and all are fully equipped. They can be used by students anytime after college. Each classroom has a projector and most of the professors use it and each class has an outer. Wi-Fi is available in the hostel. It has neat and clean rooms. Food is good moreover safety is very good.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college ever in Coimbatore.
reviews.review_text: Our college has many facilities like a Wi-Fi connection. Hostellers use labs up to 7 PM and also use a library. NCC and NSS are available in our college. Many more facilities like kho-kho courts, kabaddi courts, a fitness center for men and women, chess, carrom, ludo, etc., are available. Many indoor and outdoor games are available for the students on the college premises.

reviews.review_heading: KPRIET - You can get everything that you expect in your college life.
reviews.review_text: Here, students will get access to Wi-Fi for studying purposes and only digital classrooms. The library here is okay compared to other colleges. Here, students who come in the sports quota can get full guidance and support, and not only sports quota students, everybody can use it. The hostel is slightly strict for girls. Mess food is being prepared by maintaining proper hygiene, and the taste will be okay. Small issues like fever, cough will be treated in college by the medical room, and severe i...

reviews.review_heading: KPR Institute of Engineering and Technology is really a good college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of KPR Institute of Engineering and Technology and the campus surroundings are very beautiful. The college has spacious classrooms and well-equipped library facilities. There are also hi-tech laboratories available. The hostel facilities are nice, and the food in the hostel and canteen is hygienic. Sports ground facilities are also provided at this college.

reviews.review_heading: Really an underrated college and is going to be one of the top colleges in my city .
reviews.review_text: The labs and lab facilities of our college are top-notch with high-performance systems. Students are provided with free Wi-Fi with very strong coverage and speed. The library is huge, with 2 floors of continuing books of all genres, both fictional and nonfiction. There are also computers inside the library if you need to access e-books. Hostel dorms are very well maintained with frequent cleaning, and the restrooms are well cleaned and maintained. The hygienic side is that the rooms are top-notc...

reviews.review_heading: KPR Institute: Industry-Ready Education with Room for Growth.
reviews.review_text: At KPR Institute, the Civil Engineering department offers top-notch facilities like sponsored labs by L&T, modern classrooms, a well-stocked library, and campus-wide Wi-Fi. Hostel amenities are comfortable, the mess serves nutritious meals, medical facilities are accessible, and sports activities are encouraged for a balanced student life.

reviews.review_heading: Happy KPR—the happiest KPR, always KPR.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a library and internet facilities. Courses offered include Computer Science and Engineering, Biomedical Engineering, Artificial Intelligence and Data Science, Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning, Civil Engineering, and Chemical Engineering.

reviews.review_heading: Honest review about KPR.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of our college is very nice. College campus is always green in nature. Hostel infrastructure is also nice. They maintain separate hostels for both boys and girls with veg and non-veg canteen based on students. They celebrate hostel day with full of events for one week with DJ.

reviews.review_heading: Excellent infrastructure with good placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is excellent compared to other colleges in Coimbatore. Wi-Fi is unlimited for your laptop, but you cannot connect Wi-Fi on your mobile. All the classrooms are smart classrooms with projectors. L&T Experience Engineering Lab is also available, established with an amount of about 1 crore. Coming to the hostel, the food is average, and the restrooms are good. You will have all the facilities for sports and games.

They should produce Original Nativity Certificate. Children of Central Government Employees, irrespective of their nativity, provided their parents or guardians (only if both parents are not alive) have been serving in Tamil Nadu continuously for the past five years can be eligible to apply. Sons & daughters of All India service Tamil Nadu cadre officers are eligible to apply. A Self declaration from the parent in this regard is to be produced. Children of employees in the Public Sector or Government recognized institutions had been working in their organisations for the past five years are also eligible, irrespective of their domicile. Other State candidates who have studied VIII, IX, X, XI and XII Std. in Tamil Nadu are eligible to apply.MBA/PGDMCandidate who have completed 10+2+AMIE or 10+3 years diploma + AMIE are also eligible. admission_overview.college_name: Kongu Engineering College Admission 2025: Eligibility, Application, Selection & Dates

paragraphs: Kongu Engineering College offers various courses at UG, PG and PhD levels. Admission to all the courses is entrance-based except BSc and MSc. Candidates willing to apply for any courses must register for entrance exams and appear for the same.Kongu Engineering Collegeis affiliated with Anna University, However, the college follows the admission norms ofAnna Universityfor admission to B.E./BTech, MBA, MCA and MTech courses. To know the latest information related to Kongu Engineering College admission 2025, go through the below sections:

Kongu Engineering College admission is ongoing for all courses. The college offers both entrance and merit-based admission to all its courses. The college offers UG, PG, and PhD courses, including BTech/B.E., M.E./MTech, MCA, MBA, BSc and others.

To be eligible for admission, candidates are required to apply and appear for the entrance exam accepted by the college. The college acceptsTNEA counsellingscores for admission to BTech/B.E. and TANCET, GATE and CEETA exam scores for admission to MBA, MCA and M.E./MTech, respectively. Further, for BSc and MSc courses college offers admission based on the last qualifying exam score. Want to know other details aboutKEC- Kongu Engineering College courseeligibility along with selection criteria, check out the table below:

Kongu Engineering College's admission process includes filling out the application form qualifying for the selection rounds and paying the fee to grab the final seat. Check below the detailed steps of Kongu Engineering College admission 2025:
STEP 1: Kongu Engineering College Application Process 2025

Candidates are required to register for TANCET, GATE andCEETAfor admission to PG courses. Additionally, for admission to BTech/ B.E. candidates are required to register and appear for TNEA Counselling.
STEP 2: Kongu Engineering College Selection Round

Kongu Engineering College selects candidates forBTech/ B.E.., MBA,MCAand M.E. based on entrance exams along with counselling such as TNEA Counselling, TANCET, GATE and CEETA entrance exams, respectively.
Step 3: Admission Confirmation
The selected candidates are required to pay theKongu Engineering College feeto complete their enrollment within the given deadline to confirm and grab the final seat.

faqs.question: Are admissions to Kongu Engineering College open?
faqs.answer: Yes, admission is open to Kongu Engineering College for all UG, PG and PhD courses through TNEA, GATE, CEETA and TANCET, respectively. Further, for BSc and MSc, candidates are selected based on the last qualifying exam score. Interested candidates can visit the official websites of TNEA Counselling and TANCET to apply for the BTech and PG courses, respectively.

faqs.question: What are the top courses offered at Kongu Engineering College?
faqs.answer: The college offers various courses at UG, PG and doctoral levels such as B.E./BTech, MCA, MBA M.E./ MTech, BSc and others. Candidates who have completed Class 12 are eligible to apply for UG courses. Graduation is required to apply for the PG courses. Additionally, candidates, need to appear for TNEA counselling for admission to B.E./BTech and CEETA-PG/GATE, and TANCET for admission to MTech, MBA, MCA courses, respectively.

faqs.question: Is there an entrance for admission to Kongu Engineering College?
faqs.answer: Yes, Kongu Engineering College ccepts various entrance exams for admission to UG and PG courses. The college offers two UG i.e., BTech/B.E. and BSc and four PG courses i.e., M.E., MCA, MBA and MSc. For admission to BSc and MSc, the college offers merit-based admission. Further, the college accepts TNEA counselling for admission to BTech/B.E. and TANCET, GATE, and CEETA for admission to MBA, MCA and M.E./MTech, respectively. After filling out the admission criteria set by the college, candidates are required to apply to the official website of their respective entrance exam and fill out the admission form.

hostel_campus.college_name: Kongu Engineering College Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: The way to the success of your life.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are very neat. Library has all the books and faculty members are very friendly. Wi-Fi is also available and hostel is good. The quality of food available in the mess is okay. Good sports games are available in college disciplines and are neat.

reviews.review_heading: Kongu Engineering College is good, but this college is located on the outskirts of Erode.
reviews.review_text: The campus is green and eco-friendly and a Wi-Fi-enabled campus. In classrooms, teachers teach on a smartboard. The library is neat and clean, and students maintain silence. There are nearly 7,000 books available, which give knowledge to students.

reviews.review_heading: Kongu Engineering College is best for infrastructure and good for placement and academics.
reviews.review_text: Faculty members with Ph.D. degrees and M.Tech are being selected to teach. Multi-facility labs are available in the college with many equipment. Wi-Fi is all around the campus, and a big library is provided. Good hostel facilities are available with a sports ground, and food is available.

reviews.review_heading: Good atmosphere and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The department has smart classrooms, high-speed Wi-Fi, modern computer labs, and a well-equipped library. Hostels are clean and comfortable, with good food in the mess. Medical, sports, and gym facilities are excellent, and the hostel food is hygienic.

reviews.review_heading: An excellent college with good faculty members, infrastructure, and placement.
reviews.review_text: Modern colleges in 2025 offer comprehensive facilities for students, including campus-wide Wi-Fi, advanced computer labs, fully equipped classrooms with audio-visual aids, and libraries stocked with contemporary books and digital resources. Hostels are designed to be comfortable, featuring clean rooms, recreational space, night canteens, and amenities such as laundry services and a gymnasium. The quality of food in the mess and canteen is generally regarded as hygienic and varied, with regular m...

reviews.review_heading: Strong placements and an industry-ready AIML curriculum with excellent infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: AIML facilities include smart classrooms with projectors, Wi-Fi, specialized AI/ML labs with GPUs, software like TensorFlow/PyTorch, a library, and seminar halls. The hostel has good quality with Wi-Fi, adequate mess food (hygiene maintained), a medical center, sports complex, gym, and indoor/outdoor games facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied because of faculty staffs because of the use of rude behavior.
reviews.review_text: Food technology department has modern labs, smart classrooms, Wi-Fi, and a good library. Hostel, mess, and canteen offer quality food and hygienic stay. Medical, sports, and recreational facilities are good, ensuring student well-being and comfort.

reviews.review_heading: Good placement and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Faculty members with Ph.D. and M.Tech are being selected to teach. Multi-facility labs are available in the college with so many equipments. Wi-Fi is all around the campus, and a big library is provided. Good hostel facility is available with a sports ground. Food available is good. It has good communication.

reviews.review_heading: Kongu Engineering College - Best college in Erode.
reviews.review_text: Multi facility hostel is there with good food and hygiene. It has Wi-Fi covered campus with good connectivity. A big playground is there with 2,00,000 books. Gym and dispensary are there. Classrooms are equipped with digital boards and good cleanliness. Quality of food is really good, and wardens are friendly.

reviews.review_heading: Kongu Engineering College has best infrastructure and good for placements and academics.
reviews.review_text: Multi-facility labs are available in the college with so many equipment. Wi-Fi is all around the campus, and a big library is provided. Good facility hostel is available with a sports ground, and food is good.

reviews.review_heading: Value for money in college.
reviews.review_text: Multi-facility labs are available in the college with so many equipments. Wi-Fi is all around the campus and a big library is provided. Good facility hostel is available with a sports ground and food is good.

reviews.review_heading: Kongu Engineering College is the best infrastructure and good placement academic.
reviews.review_text: Multi-facility labs are available in the college with many equipment. Wi-Fi is all around the campus, and a big library is provided. A good hostel facility is available with a sports ground, and the food is really good.

reviews.review_heading: Good faculty but some idiots.
reviews.review_text: There is a very good library, but Wi-Fi is not that great, and you can't access social media through their internet. I am a dayscholar but heard the hostel food is very average but very hygienic. Hostel timings are very strict, but rooms are cleaned often and laundry is available for extra cash.

reviews.review_heading: Kongu Engineering College has the best infrastructure and is good for placement and academics.
reviews.review_text: Multi-facility labs are available in the college with many types of equipment. Wi-Fi is available all around the campus, and a big library is provided. A good-facility hostel is available with a sports ground, and the food provided is good.

reviews.review_heading: Value for money, recommended for others.
reviews.review_text: KEC is spread over about 167 acres of land. Built-up area (in one report) is 22.45 Lacs sq ft. Academic & IT Facilities: Classrooms: 186-200 classrooms (various reports: 186 in 2022-23). Laboratories: 135 state-of-the-art labs. Wi-Fi in classrooms.

data.description: Based on the reviews provided, the teachers at KEC-Kongu Engineering College are highly qualified and knowledgeable. They are very helpful and supportive. They also provide supplementary learning materials. The faculty is experienced and caring, which enhances the experience at the university.

reviews_list.review_title: Freshers’ experience at university.

review_content.Placements: From the last batch, 84 percent of students got placed, and all students completed 1 year of internship, as it is compulsory. The roles offered after completion are OT Technician, Anesthesia Technician, and Critical Care Technician, due to the work experience in the ICU.
review_content.Infrastructure: The university has a well-developed infrastructure. All necessary facilities are available. It includes AC classrooms, a library, and free Wi-Fi across the campus. Labs have updated equipment, with two lab classes scheduled weekly. Theory classes held in lecture or seminar rooms with a capacity of 270+ seats.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering (Software Development) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: College faculty supporting.

review_content.Placements: About 80-90% of students get placed here for Computer Science and Engineering. The highest package offered here is 43 lakhs per annum, the lowest is 3 lakhs, and the average package is 5 lakhs per annum. individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Cardiovascular Technology - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Average college with good infrastructure but poor facilities.

content.Placements: The placement rate is around 93%. The package is around 4 LPA to 9 LPA. The highest package is around 8 LPA. Top role offered is cardiac technologies. Internship can be done in a hospital. 80 to 90% of students are placed in this course.
content.Infrastructure: Library is very big, and an outside reading room is available. Classrooms are big. We have Wi-Fi and air-conditioning with good lighting and infrastructure. Practical labs are available for all subjects. Different departments have demonstration rooms and 5 lecture theatres in paramedical block.

Labs have updated equipment, with two lab classes scheduled weekly. Theory classes held in lecture or seminar rooms with a capacity of 270+ seats.

admission_overview.college_name: MMU Mullana Admission 2025: Registration, Application Process, Eligibility and Dates

paragraphs: MMDU Mullana admission process 2025 is entrance-based as well as merit-based. Candidates can apply through both online and offline modes. Located in Ambala, Maharishi Markandeshwar University (MMDU) is Deemed to be a university (MMDU) and is accredited by NAAC.MMDU Mullanaoffers UG, PG and doctoral-level programmes in the fields of Medicine, Engineering, Management, Humanities, Science, Law, etc. Candidates can obtain admission to any programme at Maharishi Markandeshwar - Deemed to be University (MMDU Mullana) by fulfilling the eligibility criteria and securing valid scores in the JEE Mains, NEET-UG, GATE, MAT, CMAT, NEET-MDS, or in the qualifying examination.

Maharishi Markandeshwar University applications are closed now for admission to UG & PG courses. It offers more than 150 courses across several streams.The courses are designed to be delivered in full-time mode. Maharishi Markandeshwar (Deemed to be University) has a dedicated training and placement cell that conducts various types of skill development programmes. Check out the MMDU Ambala admission 2025 details below:
Particulars

Maharishi Markandeshwar University fees include multiple components, such as tuition fees, hostel fees, training and placement fees, etc. There are a few components that are paid one-time, while some have to be paid semester-wise or annually, such as tuition fees.

Coming to affordability, It is among the causes of many students quitting college or their degree. Although the availability of student loans and scholarships has made education more affordable, qualifying for one of these loans or scholarships frequently comes with a set of requirements that must be met. Find below theMMDU Mullana tuition feealong with average package details for some of the courses:
Tuition Fee
INR 76.5 lakh
INR 3.7 lakh - INR 5.6 lakh
INR 1.7 lakh
INR 1.7 lakh - INR 2.4 lakh
Note: Candidates must note that this fee is sourced from the official website of the institute/university sanctioning body and is subject to change.

Maharishi Markandeshwar University invites a large number of students for admission to UG and PG courses, every year. The admissions are ongoing. Candidates can apply for admission to various courses in the academic session. In addition, the university may deem it necessary to provide instruction and research in the streams of vocation, knowledge, technology, and profession. Below is the step-by-step process for Maharishi Markandeshwar University admission:
Step 1: MMDU Mullana-Ambala Application Process 2025:Visit the official website of the university @MMDUmullana.org and apply on the admission portal

Step 2: Selection: The selectionprocess may vary from course to course at MMDU Ambala. Candidates must meet the required entrance examination score. In addition to the entrance exams, students need to clear Personal Interviews and Group Discussion rounds. For several courses, such as BA, MA, BCom, BBA, etc., passing the Class 12 exam alone becomes a qualifying criterion.

Step 3: Counselling:Maharishi Markandeshwar University will conduct counselling round for students who have valid scores in the qualifying examination and have been shortlisted in the merit list; they will be called out for the counselling session.
Step 4: Payment of fee:At the time of counselling process, candidates will have to pay the fee for their desired course.

nirf.description:
As per the overall score, Maharishi Markandeshwar University has been placed at a good position by the NIRF under the 'Overall' category, reflecting its exceptional performance in areas like Teaching, Research, Graduation Outcomes, and creating an inclusive, quality learning environment.
It has been observed that the institute has displayed an increasing trend in the 'University' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2024, Maharishi Markandeshwar University climbed 7 ranks to #71 rank in the 'University' category by the NIRF ranking. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has ascended in the rankings.
The institute has displayed a fluctuating trend in the 'Engineering' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2024, Maharishi Markandeshwar University's rank is #151, the same as last year's rank in the 'Engineering' category by the NIRF ranking.
The institute's ranks in the 'Pharmacy' category; have shown a fluctuation when evaluated against previous year's ranking. In 2024, Maharishi Markandeshwar University climbed 5 ranks to #26 rank in the 'Pharmacy' category by the NIRF ranking.
Explore the Maharishi Markandeshwar University latest rankings by other ranking bodies and their categories below:
Read less

outlook.description:
According to the rankings from Outlook, Maharishi Markandeshwar University outperformed various other institutes, securing a higher position for its achievements in Teaching, Graduation Success Rates, Research, and creating an inclusive, quality learning environment.
It has been seen that in the 'Engineering (Private)' category, the institute's ranking has scaled up when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2024, Maharishi Markandeshwar University climbed 2 ranks to #81 rank in the 'Engineering (Private)' category by the Outlook-ICARE ranking.
It has been observed that the institute has shown a decreasing trend in the 'MBA (Private)' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2024, Maharishi Markandeshwar University fell 43 ranks to #55 rank in the 'MBA (Private)' category by the Outlook-ICARE ranking.
It is noticeable that in the 'Medical (Private)' category, the institute's ranks have shown an increasing trend when evaluated against the ranking of the prior year. In 2024, Maharishi Markandeshwar University climbed 2 ranks to #17 rank in the 'Medical (Private)' category by the Outlook-ICARE ranking.

reviews.review_heading: Average college with good infrastructure but poor facilities.
reviews.review_text: Library is very big, and an outside reading room is available. Classrooms are big. We have Wi-Fi and air-conditioning with good lighting and infrastructure. Practical labs are available for all subjects. Different departments have demonstration rooms and 5 lecture theatres in paramedical block.

reviews.review_heading: College provides good placement for electrical engineering.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and facilities of our university are really good, like Wi-Fi facilities, the classroom is well organised, and even the libraries are available with a strong Wi-Fi connection. Food quality in the mess is awesome compared to various other private universities, but here you will get only vegetarian food.

reviews.review_heading: Freshers’ experience at university.
reviews.review_text: The university has a well-developed infrastructure. All necessary facilities are available. It includes AC classrooms, a library, and free Wi-Fi across the campus. Labs have updated equipment, with two lab classes scheduled weekly. Theory classes held in lecture or seminar rooms with a capacity of 270+ seats.

reviews.review_heading: College faculty supporting.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and facilities of our university are really good, like Wi-Fi facilities. Classrooms are well organized, and even libraries are available with a strong Wi-Fi connection. The food quality in the mess is awesome compared to various other private universities, but here you will get only vegetarian food.

reviews.review_heading: College infrastructure is amazing.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and facilities of our university are really good, like Wi-Fi facilities, the classrooms are well organized, and even the libraries are available with a strong Wi-Fi connection. Food quality in the mess is awesome compared to various other private universities, but here you will get only vegetarian food.

reviews.review_heading: College provides everyone with placement.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and facilities of our university are really good, like Wi-Fi facilities, the classroom is well organised, and even the libraries are available with a strong Wi-Fi connection. Food quality in the mess is awesome compared to various other private universities, but here you will get only vegetarian food.

reviews.review_heading: The college provides placement opportunities to everyone.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure and facilities of our university are really good. It includes Wi-Fi, well-organized classrooms, and libraries with strong Wi-Fi connections. The food quality in the mess is excellent compared to various other private universities, but here you get only vegetarian food.

reviews.review_heading: In a nutshell, I am very satisfied.
reviews.review_text: The university is pretty big, with more than 10 hostels for girls. The mess provides a good and healthy balanced meal throughout the semester, with changes in meals according to the season. The college has all the latest books and computers to facilitate students in their studies. Most of the facilities, like the hospital and ATM, are available.

reviews.review_heading: Comprehensive review about MMDU.
reviews.review_text: There are separate hostels for boys and girls, AC and non-AC rooms, furnished rooms with bed, study table, chair, almirah, and some with balconies. Mess providing hygienic meals (vegetarian options for international students). Facilities like common room, TVs, and indoor games are available.

reviews.review_heading: My college is my best friend, as it taught me so many valuable things.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the university is top-class, whether it's about class or hostels. The college premises are kept very neat and clean. Talking about computer labs, Wi-Fi or libraries, they are properly maintained and are being ensured that students may get the service. The hostel food is also very good, although it can't beat the homemade food, but still it's better.

reviews.review_heading: Summary - College is very good. Infrastructure is good and has good faculty members.
reviews.review_text: There are many course, and hostels are very good in quality and condition. It is a very good place. There is a medical course that is in the top 1. This university summary is that all courses and the hostels are very good for students.

reviews.review_heading: This university is overall good.
reviews.review_text: There are a lot of facilities given to the students by the campus, like computer labs, centralised AC in classrooms, a beautiful and peaceful environment in the library, etc. The quality of mess food and other facilities for hostel students is much better here.

reviews.review_heading: Really, very good infrastructure and education in this college.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is very nice, like Wi-Fi is always high-speed, labs are neat and clean, the classroom is fully AC and hitech technologies, the library is very nice, like a 5-star place, hostel facilities are also very good, food is tasty, and everything is clean, medical facilities are free, we have a 16-acre sports field and sports complex.

reviews.review_heading: Good and supportive faculty.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a well-planned layout and well-furnished classrooms with air-conditioning in almost every lecture room. The campus of the college has fast, free Wi-Fi connectivity. Our college has a very big central library, which helps in the holistic intellectual growth of students. Hostels are also well-maintained with proper sanitation and water supply.

reviews.review_heading: Very nice faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Nice facilities. The primary responsibility of the mess is quite good, and also the facilities of the mess and the food are good. Medical facilities are also available on our college campus. A lot of chemist shops are available. All good.

data.description: MMU Mullana offers a wide range of infrastructural facilities to students. The university provides the students with accommodation facilities for boys and girls separately. The hostels at the MMU Mullana offer all the basic amenities to students such as WIFi, medical services, mess, washrooms, Gym, etc. MMU Mullana has a huge library with a rich collection of books, e-books, journals, magazines and other periodicals. The central library publishes a peer-reviewed quarterly journal “International Journal of Information Dissemination and Technology” since 2011 and provides a seating capacity for more than 1500 readers.

college_info.intro:
PES College Bangalore is famous for its flagship BTech, MBA, & BSc courses. Studying these PESU Bangalore flagship programmes at PES University helps to support the professional and personal growth of the students. This is done through a holistic and immersive learning experience. BTech students engage with the corporate sector on a variety of platforms ranging from industry visits, workshops, hackathons, internships, and industry-wide events such as summits, seminars, conferences, and others. BTech Computer Science & Engineering (Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning) is one of the most popularly opted specialisation. Some of the key highlights of this programme are below:
PES University Bangalore MBA is a full-time, 2-year programme, which consists of a core curriculum along with an internship and various elective courses. PES MBA Bangalore is offered in various major specialisations, including Business Analytics, Finance, Marketing, Human Capital, and Operation Management, among others. The PESU Venture Labs, established by the university, funds the business ideas of students, to help them realise their dream of becoming an entrepreneur. Here is more info around PES College Bangalore courses:

student_insights.feedback: Students can work with faculty on research projects
Many students started their own start-ups
Strong alumni network that help with placement opportunities
Very Active and resourceful, college is also involved
Loved in first year but not in later years

faqs.answer: A:    The University has not released the placement percentage. The total number of offers made has been released for the batch 2025.  Morethan 350 companies visited the PES University campus in 2025 and presented over 1,500 job offers to the students.
faqs.question: Is there 100% placement in PES University?

faqs.answer: A:    The University has disclosed the highest salary for the 2025 passing out batch. The PES University highest package for 2025 placements was INR 68 LPA. Additionally, over 1,500 placement offers were made during the drive.
faqs.question: What was the highest package offered in PES University?

faqs.answer: A:    According to the latest report, the overall highest package secured by the students of the batch 2025 stood at INR 68 LPA. Over 350 companies participated during PES University placements 2025 and presented over 1,500 placement offers to the students. Some of the top recruiters include Amazon, Google, KPMG, HP, Deloitte, Cosco, Flipkart, etc.

faqs.answer: A:    PES University offers PharmD as a 6 year course with an annual intake of 30 students. The University offers the respective course with a total tuition fees worth INR 16.8 Lakh. Admission to PharmD is offered on then basis of valid scores of KCET. Candidates must visit the official website to learn more about the eligibility criteria for the admission to PharmD.
faqs.question: What is the fees for PharmD course at PES University?

faqs.answer: A:    PES Bangalore offers courses at the UG, PG and PhD level across the fields of Engineering, Medicine, Architecture, Design, Management and Commerce, Economics and many more, The University offers these courses on the basis of merit and various accepted entrance exams. PES Bangalore fee structure includes a tuition fees ranging from INR 1.9 Lacs to INR 20 Lakh. In comparison to other universities, the cost of academia is higher. However, the University various other facilities apart from academia which is worth the cost being paid.
faqs.question: How costly is PES University?

faqs.answer: A:    For admission to MCA at PES University, there is minimum eligibility criteria that needs to fulfil before applying for this course. Interested candidates need to pass graduation either with a minimum 50% aggregate in BSc/BCom/BA with Mathematics as one of the subjects at Class 12 or graduation level or in BCA with a minimum 50% aggregate. Final year students can also apply on a provisional basis, subject to meeting the eligibility criteria at the time of admission. The admission to MCA course will be based on PESSAT or PGCET score.
faqs.question: What is the qualification for MCA in PES University?

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, admission to BTech is entrance-based. Students can take admission to the BTech course of PES University through JEE Main. The university considers JEE Main scores for admission to all the BTech specialisations, including Computer Science and Engineering, Electronics and Communication Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, and more. The other option for the BTech course admission is to qualify PESSAT or KCET entrance exams. Interested candidates are required to fulfil the minimum eligibility criteria before applying for the course as a mandatory step. Check here for detailed admission process for BTech.

reviews_list.review_title: One of the top colleges in Bangalore, with top-notch infrastructure and faculty members.

review_content.Placements: Placements are really good, mainly because the college is located in a city like Bangalore. Compared to other colleges such as BMS and MSRIT, the placements are much better. They have a median package of 18 to 20 LPA for the AIML course, which is likely to increase in the future.
review_content.Infrastructure: The canteen and hostel facilities are really good. This might be the best thing about the university. The libraries are of top-notch quality. They have great basketball courts, badminton courts, and other sports facilities. The food available in the canteen is also amazing.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.B.A. LL.B. (Hons.) - Batch of 2030
reviews_list.review_title: I'm satisfied with the infrastructure, but it can include more extracurricular activities.

review_content.Placements: So 80-90% of students from my course got placed in top companies, and most of us managed to get jobs through campus placement. The highest salary package offered in our course is around 25 to 26 LPA. The average package is roughly around 11-13 LPA. Some of the top companies include KPMG, Deloitte, HDFC Bank, TCS, DELL, etc. Around 80-95% students got internships, and some companies offering internships are Wipro and Accenture. The roles offered through placement and internships are legal advisory, business development, legal research, and consulting.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: Completely worth a one-time investment.

review_content.Placements: According to our seniors and the placement information given by them, around 85-90% of the people who were eligible for placements were offered internships/placements. The highest package was around 56-60 LPA last year, the lowest was maybe 3.2 LPA, and the average is 12 LPA. The whole MAANG came itself. Everybody who was eligible got an internship. Software Engineer/ SDE-2, Data Analyst, and Data Engineer roles are offered.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is good, but restricted to one device only, and the internet doesn't come on the campus. Classrooms and faculty are all world-class. I'm a day-scholar, but as per my peeps, hostel food is bad. But the canteen food is top-notch. Sports facilities are also top-notch. Gym (10K for RR campus and 6K for EC campus), both are good.

review_summary.college_name: PES University Bangalore Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: I am very satisfied with the college.

content.Placements: A total of 740 in the seniors' batch. Around 540 have been placed, and many have gone for higher studies. The highest package was 60 LPA. The median is around 12-13 LPA, and the lowest is not available. Companies like Zomato, IBM, Google, AWS, etc., come to this college. The top roles include SDE and ML engineer.
content.Infrastructure: Faculty have higher education with doctorate degrees, but the teaching is not very good. Most of the students self-study to score well. Infrastructure is 10/10. All the facilities are good, and everything you need will be available. As I am a day scholar, I don't know much about the hostel and mess.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: There are a lot of clubs technical and non technical which are worth.

content.Placements: In electronics and communication the placement was not that good compared to CSE till last year. The placements are decent for ECE but then in the last year there is a slight dip in the placements for CSE. The placement ratio is almost the same as before.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is nice and has a lot of extracurricular sports and a lot of eating spots. There are separate places for the hackathons to be conducted. There are a lot of auditoriums. There are separate blocks of each branch like B.Tech B.Com BBA etc.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: One of the top colleges in Bangalore, with top-notch infrastructure and faculty members.

content.Placements: Placements are really good, mainly because the college is located in a city like Bangalore. Compared to other colleges such as BMS and MSRIT, the placements are much better. They have a median package of 18 to 20 LPA for the AIML course, which is likely to increase in the future.
content.Infrastructure: The canteen and hostel facilities are really good. This might be the best thing about the university. The libraries are of top-notch quality. They have great basketball courts, badminton courts, and other sports facilities. The food available in the canteen is also amazing.

individual_reviews.course: B.B.A. LL.B. (Hons.) - Batch of 2030
individual_reviews.title: I'm satisfied with the infrastructure, but it can include more extracurricular activities.

content.Placements: So 80-90% of students from my course got placed in top companies, and most of us managed to get jobs through campus placement. The highest salary package offered in our course is around 25 to 26 LPA. The average package is roughly around 11-13 LPA. Some of the top companies include KPMG, Deloitte, HDFC Bank, TCS, DELL, etc. Around 80-95% students got internships, and some companies offering internships are Wipro and Accenture. The roles offered through placement and internships are legal advisory, business development, legal research, and consulting.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Completely worth a one-time investment.

content.Placements: According to our seniors and the placement information given by them, around 85-90% of the people who were eligible for placements were offered internships/placements. The highest package was around 56-60 LPA last year, the lowest was maybe 3.2 LPA, and the average is 12 LPA. The whole MAANG came itself. Everybody who was eligible got an internship. Software Engineer/ SDE-2, Data Analyst, and Data Engineer roles are offered.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is good, but restricted to one device only, and the internet doesn't come on the campus. Classrooms and faculty are all world-class. I'm a day-scholar, but as per my peeps, hostel food is bad. But the canteen food is top-notch. Sports facilities are also top-notch. Gym (10K for RR campus and 6K for EC campus), both are good.
